rat_meat.name: rat meat
rat_meat.sprite_desc: A raw slab of pinkish-brown rat meat with visible sinew, sitting on a rough wooden cutting board
rat_meat.lore: Stringy, grey flesh stripped from the oversized vermin of the upper warrens. Veteran dungeon cooks claim that slow-roasting drives off the disease and leaves behind a lean, gamey meat surprisingly rich in sustaining fat.

goblin_flesh.name: goblin flesh
goblin_flesh.sprite_desc: A chunk of greenish-grey goblin flesh with a leathery hide edge, faintly glistening
goblin_flesh.lore: Tough, acrid meat from a creature that subsists on rot and mischief. Those with the stomach and skill to prepare it properly find it carries a cunning vitality — perhaps an echo of the goblin's wiry, scheming nature.

snake_meat.name: snake meat
snake_meat.sprite_desc: A pale coil of boneless snake meat with a subtle green sheen, neatly sliced into medallions
snake_meat.lore: Pale, firm flesh coiled from the cave cobra's lightless domain, faintly warm to the touch where venom once coursed. Carefully prepared, it is said to lend the eater something of the serpent's preternatural stillness and heat-sensing awareness.

fire_gland.name: fire gland
fire_gland.sprite_desc: A glowing orange-red organ sac pulsing with inner heat, tiny embers drifting from its surface
fire_gland.lore: A small amber sac plucked from behind the fire beetle's carapace, glowing faintly orange and warm as a coal. It pulses with stored bioluminescent fuel that alchemists and cooks alike prize for its fiery, illuminating properties.

gnoll_hide.name: gnoll hide
gnoll_hide.sprite_desc: A patch of coarse tawny fur-covered hide with dark spots, rolled and tied with cord
gnoll_hide.lore: Coarse, spotted hide reeking of blood and the open hunt, still bristling with stiff hyena fur along the ridge. Tanners who can stomach the smell produce from it a leather of extraordinary toughness, as though the gnoll's predatory endurance is woven into every fiber.

troll_hide.name: troll hide
troll_hide.sprite_desc: A thick slab of mossy green troll hide with visible pores, still faintly regenerating at the edges
troll_hide.lore: A thick, rubbery slab of grey-green skin that twitches faintly even after death, as though still trying to knit itself back together. Alchemists render it down for a viscous paste said to accelerate the mending of wounds with uncanny speed.

bear_meat.name: bear meat
bear_meat.sprite_desc: A dark red haunch of bear meat marbled with fat, resting on a bed of wild herbs
bear_meat.lore: Dense, dark-red flesh from a beast that ruled its level of the dungeon like a king. It carries the iron smell of deep earth and raw strength, and those who feast on it well-prepared feel something of the cave bear's immovable fortitude stir in their bones.

manticore_spine.name: manticore spine
manticore_spine.sprite_desc: A wickedly curved venomous spine in deep crimson-purple, barbed at the tip, leaking pale toxin
manticore_spine.lore: A barbed spike the length of a finger, ivory-white and hollow at the core, harvested from the manticore's fearsome tail. Persian texts warn that the residual venom within never fully fades — but in precise measure, it is said to sharpen reflexes to a predatory edge.

basilisk_stone.name: basilisk stone
basilisk_stone.sprite_desc: A smooth petrified stone organ with swirling grey-green mineral veins, cold to the touch
basilisk_stone.lore: A dense, oddly warm nodule found within the basilisk's skull — not quite flesh, not quite mineral, as though its own petrification magic turned inward over centuries. Sages believe it retains a fragment of that transmuting power, capable of hardening whatever it is rendered into.

chimera_heart.name: chimera heart
chimera_heart.sprite_desc: A grotesque three-chambered heart in purple and red, each lobe from a different beast
chimera_heart.lore: Three-chambered and still faintly smoldering, the chimera's heart beats with the mingled blood of lion, goat, and serpent. It reeks of char and wild magic, and those who handle it without care find their fingers numb from the conflicting energies warring within.

frost_gland.name: frost gland
frost_gland.sprite_desc: A translucent ice-blue organ encased in a thin shell of frost crystals, radiating cold mist
frost_gland.lore: A crystalline blue sac harvested from the frost crawler's underbelly, so cold it burns bare skin on contact and exhales a thin mist into warm air. Alchemists seal it in lead-lined vials, knowing the supercooled ichor within can flash-freeze whatever it touches.

medusa_blood.name: Medusa's Blood
medusa_blood.lore: The ichor of the Gorgon. From her right side flows poison; from her left, a healing draught.
medusa_blood.sprite_desc: A sealed glass vial of luminous green blood with faint serpentine shapes swirling within

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.lore: A gleaming scale of fireproof dragon hide. It smells of sulfur and ancient gold.
dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A single massive scale of burnished orange-gold with a molten shimmer along its razor edge

bronze_feather.name: bronze feather
bronze_feather.sprite_desc: A long metallic bronze feather with a lethal serrated edge, gleaming like polished weaponry
bronze_feather.lore: A feather hard as hammered metal, its edge keen enough to draw blood if handled carelessly, still carrying the faint sacred warmth of Ares' favor. Smiths and enchanters covet it, for a blade edged with bronze feather shavings is said to strike with the unerring force of a divine missile.

quasit_claw.name: quasit claw
quasit_claw.sprite_desc: A small curved demonic claw in deep purple-black, crackling with residual infernal energy
quasit_claw.lore: A small, hooked claw of deep violet chitin, still slick with the spite of the creature it came from. Warlocks prize it as a catalyst for minor bindings, claiming the quasit's innate malice lingers in the material and gives enchantments a crueler, more persistent bite.

bone_shard.name: bone shard
bone_shard.sprite_desc: A jagged shard of yellowed bone with a sharp splintered edge, ancient and dry
bone_shard.lore: A splinter of yellowed bone from an archer animated past death, its surface etched faintly with the dark runes that kept it marching. Necromancers note that the residual animation magic clings stubbornly to the fragment, like an echo of purpose that refuses to be silenced.

rotted_flesh.name: rotted flesh
rotted_flesh.sprite_desc: A decomposing chunk of grey-green flesh wrapped in burial cloth, reeking of undeath
rotted_flesh.lore: A grey, fetid scrap of decaying sinew that falls apart at rough handling, smelling of grave-damp and dark magic in equal measure. Alchemists who can work past the stench extract from it a foul but potent necrotic essence — the last whisper of life refusing to fully depart.

green_slime_extract.name: green slime extract
green_slime_extract.sprite_desc: A bubbling vial of bright green acidic gel with tiny dissolving particles suspended within
green_slime_extract.lore: A viscous, caustic fluid pressed from the body of the dungeon's most patient ambush predator, glowing a faint, sickly green in darkness. In a skilled alchemist's hands it becomes a controlled corrosive of remarkable potency; in an unskilled one's, it becomes a catastrophe.

spider_silk.name: spider silk
spider_silk.sprite_desc: A shimmering bundle of silvery-white spider silk threads, impossibly thin yet strong as steel
spider_silk.lore: Gossamer threads of extraordinary tensile strength, harvested from the web spinner's elaborate traps and wound into pale, almost luminous skeins. Weavers and enchanters prize it equally — the silk holds a binding quality that seems to go beyond mere stickiness, as though the web still remembers its purpose.

frog_legs.name: frog legs
frog_legs.sprite_desc: A pair of plump pale-green frog legs tied together at the ankle, fresh and ready to cook
frog_legs.lore: Long, muscular limbs from a creature capable of crossing a corridor in a single explosive leap, the flesh pale and faintly sweet-smelling. Dungeon cooks prize them above most other cave meats for their tenderness, and diners often swear they feel something of the giant frog's startling quickness in their own step afterward.

satyr_horn.name: satyr horn
satyr_horn.sprite_desc: A curved ridged horn of pale ivory with a warm amber base, faintly scented with pine resin
satyr_horn.lore: A short, ridged horn still faintly reeking of wine and woodsmoke, broken from a satyr who chose exile and war over revelry. Legend holds that Dionysus' touch never fully leaves his followers — and that the horn, ground into a draught, carries the god's gift of loosened inhibition and reckless, intoxicating courage.

raven_feather.name: raven feather
raven_feather.sprite_desc: A sleek jet-black feather with an iridescent blue-purple sheen along its vane
raven_feather.lore: A glossy black feather of unnatural iridescence, cool and weightless as a whispered secret, shed from a bird that carries Odin's sight in its hollow bones. Those who burn it and breathe the smoke claim the world grows briefly, brilliantly legible — as though Thought itself had passed through them on dark wings.

scarab_shell.name: scarab shell
scarab_shell.sprite_desc: A polished teal-green scarab carapace with intricate geometric ridges and a golden underside
scarab_shell.lore: A lacquered carapace of deep lapis and gold, sacred to Khepri who rolls the sun across the sky. Corrupted by dark magic, it still hums faintly with transformative energy—alchemists prize it as a catalyst for potions of rebirth.

dretch_gland.name: dretch gland
dretch_gland.sprite_desc: A shriveled brownish-green demonic gland leaking foul yellowish ichor
dretch_gland.lore: A reeking sac of bilious fluid harvested from the most pitiful rank of demonkind. Its stench alone is a weapon, and even dried to a powder it retains a foul potency that corrodes both flesh and spirit.

imp_stinger.name: imp stinger
imp_stinger.sprite_desc: A needle-thin crimson stinger still glistening with infernal venom at its barbed tip
imp_stinger.lore: A needle-fine barb from the tail of a devil no larger than a cat, slick with infernal venom that carries a trace of hellfire. Cunning poison-crafters covet it, for its malice is concentrated into every drop.

troglodyte_musk.name: troglodyte musk
troglodyte_musk.sprite_desc: A sealed clay jar of pungent olive-green musk that shimmers with oily iridescence
troglodyte_musk.lore: A thick, amber-colored secretion scraped from the glands of a cave lizard-man, so pungent it makes the eyes water at ten paces. In vanishingly small quantities, herbalists claim it can mask all other scents entirely.

bullywug_leg.name: bullywug leg
bullywug_leg.sprite_desc: A muscular amphibian leg with mottled green-brown skin and webbed toes
bullywug_leg.lore: A long, powerful limb stripped from a swamp-dwelling frog-man, still twitching with residual nervous energy. Rendered down, it yields oils said to grant extraordinary spring and swiftness to the legs.

warrior_bone.name: warrior bone
warrior_bone.sprite_desc: A polished femur bone from an undead warrior, etched with faded battle runes
warrior_bone.lore: A dense femur from a soldier whose martial discipline outlasted death itself, the bone hardened by decades of undying purpose. Powdered and steeped, it is rumored to impart some ghost of that relentless fighting instinct.

bone_marrow.name: bone marrow
bone_marrow.sprite_desc: A cracked bone filled with pale pinkish-cream marrow, rich and gelatinous
bone_marrow.lore: Dark, viscous marrow drawn from the hollow leg bones of a grave-hound, cold as the tomb and faintly luminescent. It nourishes with a terrible efficiency, carrying within it the tireless hunger of the undead.

yellow_spores.name: yellow spores
yellow_spores.sprite_desc: A glass vial packed with bright golden-yellow fungal spores that drift and swirl
yellow_spores.lore: A fine, sulfur-bright powder that drifts from the mold's broken flesh and clings to everything it touches. Even a pinch breathed in fills the skull with visions—but a cook of precise skill can transform it into something that expands the mind without destroying it.

beetle_shell.name: beetle shell
beetle_shell.sprite_desc: A dark emerald beetle carapace with a hard glossy surface and saw-toothed edges
beetle_shell.lore: A shard of iridescent carapace that shifts between emerald and violet depending on the angle of light, hard enough to turn a knife blade. Armorers and alchemists alike covet it for its near-impenetrable properties.

lizard_meat.name: lizard meat
lizard_meat.sprite_desc: A lean slab of pale greenish-white lizard flesh with fine scales still attached
lizard_meat.lore: Dense, pale flesh from a reptile that waited like a painted stone before striking. Lean and mineral-rich, it is slow to spoil and carries a subtle warmth that seems to persist long after cooking.

sea_snake_venom.name: sea snake venom
sea_snake_venom.sprite_desc: A small blue-glass vial of translucent cyan venom with tiny crystalline flecks
sea_snake_venom.lore: A small glass-pale drop of neurotoxin milked from the fangs of a sea serpent, almost odorless and perfectly clear. Apothecaries handle it with lead tongs—in the hands of a master, the line between paralysis and preternatural stillness is a question of measure.

pixie_dust.name: pixie dust
pixie_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of sparkling lavender-pink dust that floats upward when disturbed
pixie_dust.lore: A shimmering cascade of iridescent motes that smells of honeysuckle and midnight air. Gathered carefully, it retains the enchantment that lures the mind toward sleep—or, in smaller doses, toward dreams while waking.

myconid_spore.name: myconid spore
myconid_spore.sprite_desc: A soft purple-brown mushroom cap releasing a haze of pale violet spores
myconid_spore.lore: Soft violet-grey spores released in a gentle cloud from the cap of a fungal folk-worker, carrying the memory of vast underground gardens. Cooks who steep them carefully say the resulting broth grants a strange, rootlike communion with one's surroundings.

empusa_ichor.name: empusa ichor
empusa_ichor.sprite_desc: A vial of hot magenta ichor that pulses with a faint seductive warmth
empusa_ichor.lore: A mercurial fluid that cannot settle on a single color, shifting as the shape-shifting demoness shifted, staining the fingers of Hecate's crossroads crimson then black. Herbalists and witches both claim it has transformative properties—though none agree on what it transforms.

grave_dust.name: grave dust
grave_dust.sprite_desc: A leather pouch of fine grey-brown dust that smells of ancient earth and decay
grave_dust.lore: Ashen grey powder shed from the body of a Draugr, carrying the cold weight of a Norse barrow and the smell of iron-rich earth. The dust is said to preserve whatever it touches, slowing decay and stubbornly refusing to be washed away.

changeling_glamour.name: changeling glamour
changeling_glamour.sprite_desc: A shimmering opalescent orb of liquid light that shifts color when tilted
changeling_glamour.lore: A faintly iridescent residue left behind when the changeling's false face finally fell away, cool and silky as moonlight on still water. Those who handle it report an unsettling sensation of almost recognizing themselves in a stranger's face.

demon_claw.name: demon claw
demon_claw.sprite_desc: A thick curved claw of blackened red chitin, cracked and still radiating heat
demon_claw.lore: A hooked talon wrenched from a Rutterkin's gnarled fist, black as charred bone and still warm with spite. It exudes a faint sulfurous heat and is favored by dark craftsmen who wish to edge their tools with cruelty.

homunculus_blood.name: homunculus blood
homunculus_blood.sprite_desc: A tiny flask of deep violet blood that moves with unnatural purpose inside the glass
homunculus_blood.lore: A tiny vial of silver-tinged blood from a wizard's crafted servant, still faintly warm and threaded with alchemical compounds that refuse to separate. It carries a ghost of psychic resonance—those who consume it report strange, borrowed dreams.

gray_slime.name: gray slime
gray_slime.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of thick silvery-grey ooze that slowly shifts and reforms on its own
gray_slime.lore: A cold, featureless grey gel scraped from the ooze's dissolving body, indistinguishable in color from dungeon stone and nearly odorless. Alchemists prize it as a universal solvent base, though it has a troubling tendency to digest whatever vessel it is stored in.

piercer_shell.name: piercer shell
piercer_shell.sprite_desc: A conical stalactite-shaped shell of striated brown and grey stone, razor-sharp at the tip
piercer_shell.lore: A cone of ridged, chalky shell from a creature that spent its entire life pretending to be stone, waiting for the one perfect moment to fall. It is heavier than it looks and holds an uncanny edge when ground to a point—patient, precise, and lethal.

paralytic_venom.name: paralytic venom
paralytic_venom.sprite_desc: A stoppered vial of pale chartreuse venom that numbs on contact with skin
paralytic_venom.lore: Milked from the writhing tentacles of the Carrion Crawler, this viscous amber fluid carries the stillness of a tomb. Alchemists prize it for its ability to arrest motion in living tissue—useful in surgery or, in darker hands, in ambush.

lizardfolk_scale.name: lizardfolk scale
lizardfolk_scale.sprite_desc: A tough overlapping scale of mottled green and brown, trimmed with a horn edge
lizardfolk_scale.lore: A broad, olive-green scale shed from the hide of a Lizardfolk warrior, smelling faintly of river mud and cold blood. The reptilian pragmatism of its former owner seems to linger in its density—it yields to neither flame nor sentiment.

arcane_bone_dust.name: arcane bone dust
arcane_bone_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of finely ground bone powder with faint violet arcane sparks dancing within
arcane_bone_dust.lore: Ground from the finger bones of wizards who clung to their spellcraft beyond the grave, this pale powder crackles faintly with residual magic. A skilled hand might coax its latent energy into a potion, though the spirits it belonged to do not surrender their power willingly.

charred_bone.name: charred bone
charred_bone.sprite_desc: A blackened bone fragment scorched by hellfire, still warm and smelling of ash
charred_bone.lore: Bone scorched by hellfire that neither consumes nor cools, its surface a glistening black threaded with ember-orange veins. The heat within is stubborn and strange—even powdered and boiled, it lends whatever it touches a feverish, burning warmth.

frost_bone.name: frost bone
frost_bone.sprite_desc: A bone shard encased in a thin shell of permanent ice, cold mist rising from its surface
frost_bone.lore: Blue-white and cold as a midwinter battlefield, this bone once belonged to a warrior whose spirit merged with the permafrost of some forgotten tundra. It weeps a faint mist in warm air, and herbalists speak of distilling its chill into draughts that slow the blood and steady the nerves.

plague_flesh.name: plague flesh
plague_flesh.sprite_desc: A chunk of sickly grey-green flesh covered in weeping sores and wrapped in cloth
plague_flesh.lore: A foul, glistening strip of flesh still dark with virulent contagion, reeking of rot and iron. Only the most reckless or most learned alchemists handle it without gloves—in infinitesimal, precisely rendered doses, some claim it can teach the body to resist the very sickness it carries.

brown_mold_patch.name: brown mold patch
brown_mold_patch.sprite_desc: A dried patch of fuzzy brown mold on bark, releasing faint warmth-draining cold
brown_mold_patch.lore: Scraped from the cavern wall where warmth goes to die, this damp, rust-colored growth drinks heat from the air around it like a living cold-trap. Preserved in an insulated vial, it is sought after for its paradoxical property of drawing fire inward rather than spreading it outward.

wasp_venom.name: wasp venom
wasp_venom.sprite_desc: A bright amber vial of giant wasp venom, viscous and faintly buzzing with energy
wasp_venom.lore: Extracted from the stinger of a giant wasp, this bright yellow venom carries a sharp, acidic scent like vinegar and burning grass. Even a drop on the tongue brings a creeping paralysis that begins in the jaw and moves inward with patient, merciless purpose.

mud_crawler_hide.name: mud crawler hide
mud_crawler_hide.sprite_desc: A patch of thick mud-brown hide caked with dried clay and tiny embedded stones
mud_crawler_hide.lore: A thick slab of hide from a mud crawler, cured in the very silt that once coated it, smelling of stagnant water and minerals. Its interlocking scales turn away a blade with contemptuous ease, and leatherworkers speak of it in reverent, envious tones.

lucky_clover.name: lucky clover
lucky_clover.sprite_desc: A perfect four-leaf clover of vivid emerald green with a faint golden aura
lucky_clover.lore: Pulled from the bitter fingers of a leprechaun who had been robbed once too often, this vibrant four-leafed clover still hums with captured fortune. It smells of Irish peat and morning dew, and those who crush it in their palm claim to feel probability itself bend, however briefly, in their favor.

toxic_thorn.name: toxic thorn
toxic_thorn.sprite_desc: A long barbed thorn of deep green with black veins, dripping slow purple poison
toxic_thorn.lore: A barbed black thorn fired from the body of a Thorn Slinger, its tip still glistening with a resinous, slow-acting venom. The poison works quietly, like a secret kept too long—masters of herbalism have learned to dilute its essence into preparations of alarming potency.

spore_cloud_vial.name: spore cloud vial
spore_cloud_vial.sprite_desc: A sealed glass vial of swirling yellow-green gas with tiny spore particles suspended within
spore_cloud_vial.lore: Carefully sealed the moment after the gas spore burst, this clouded vial contains a swirling suspension of fungal spores that pulse with a faint, sickly bioluminescence. Those who study such things warn that the cloud inside is a patient thing, waiting only for glass to become air.

goblin_crown_dust.name: goblin crown dust
goblin_crown_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of glittering gold-green dust scraped from a goblin king's crude crown
goblin_crown_dust.lore: The pulverized remnants of a goblin king's crown—whether bone, bent iron, or stolen gold is now indistinguishable—still carrying the faintest odor of authority and unwashed ambition. Rumor holds that a potion brewed with it grants a crude but undeniable force of presence.

shadow_fur.name: shadow fur
shadow_fur.sprite_desc: A tuft of impossibly dark fur that seems to absorb light, cold and silky to the touch
shadow_fur.lore: Clipped from one of Hecate's spectral hounds that roam the crossroads of the living and dead, this fur is cool to the touch and absorbs light rather than reflecting it. It carries the faint scent of cypress and distant torchlight, and those who weave it into preparations speak of an uncanny awareness of thresholds—seen and unseen.

khepri_carapace.name: khepri carapace
khepri_carapace.sprite_desc: A sacred scarab shell of brilliant teal-blue with golden hieroglyphic markings
khepri_carapace.lore: A fragment of iridescent shell from one of Khepri's sacred beetles, shimmering between deep blue and burnished gold like a sunrise caught in stone. The Egyptians believed the scarab's shell held the mystery of rebirth within its curve, and even broken and harvested, this piece radiates a warmth that feels less like heat and more like beginning.

puca_hair.name: puca hair
puca_hair.sprite_desc: A lock of wild purple-black hair that shifts between animal textures: fur, mane, feather
puca_hair.lore: A coarse lock of hair taken from a Púca mid-shift, still uncertain whether it belongs to horse, goat, or something in between—dark as a moonless Irish road and faintly iridescent. Fairy-lore holds that braiding it into a preparation grants fleetness and deception in equal, unreliable measure.

enchanted_wood.name: enchanted wood
enchanted_wood.sprite_desc: A chunk of living wood still faintly glowing with green veins of magical sap
enchanted_wood.lore: A splinter of timber from an animated wood golem, still faintly warm with the simple enchantment that once moved it. It smells of pine resin and old runes, and artificers prize it as a vessel for holding minor magical charges the way dead wood holds rainwater.

kobold_scale.name: kobold scale
kobold_scale.sprite_desc: A tiny rust-orange scale with a rough texture, lightweight but surprisingly tough
kobold_scale.lore: A small, ruddy scale etched with faint draconic markings, shed from a kobold sorcerer elevated by the fire that runs in its blood. It smells of sulfur and ambition—not dragon-great, but tenacious—and alchemists find it a useful if volatile base for fire-aspected preparations.

darkmantle_membrane.name: darkmantle membrane
darkmantle_membrane.sprite_desc: A sheet of thin rubbery dark purple membrane that ripples with residual shadow magic
darkmantle_membrane.lore: A thin, leathery membrane peeled from a Darkmantle's mantle, dark as a snuffed candle and faintly translucent at the edges. It carries a residue of the magical darkness it once generated—held up to a flame, the light does not pass through so much as disappear.

zombie_flesh.name: zombie flesh
zombie_flesh.sprite_desc: A grey-green slab of decomposing flesh held together with black stitching
zombie_flesh.lore: Bloated and dense with necromantic energy, this grey-green flesh from a Zombie Hulk has a terrible, rubbery resilience even in death. It reeks of charnel corruption and old power, and those who dare render it down speak of extracting a grotesque vitality that the body of the dead refused to surrender.

thrall_blood.name: thrall blood
thrall_blood.sprite_desc: A stoppered crystal vial of deep crimson blood that refuses to coagulate
thrall_blood.lore: Sluggish and faintly luminescent, this crimson ichor carries the diluted essence of a vampire's gift—enough dark vitality to make a man into a weapon. It smells of iron and midnight roses, and those who handle it too long feel an inexplicable pull toward obedience.

cairn_stone.name: cairn stone
cairn_stone.sprite_desc: A smooth flat river stone etched with ancient warding symbols, cold as grave earth
cairn_stone.lore: A rough-hewn fieldstone taken from a roadside cairn, still humming with the spite of the wight it anchored. Grave-scholars say the marks etched into its face are not runes but memories, pressed into rock by decades of restless fury.

hollow_bone.name: hollow bone
hollow_bone.sprite_desc: A thin translucent bone fragment, completely empty inside, light as paper
hollow_bone.lore: A bone drained of marrow and meaning alike, so light it seems to weigh nothing at all—as if something essential was torn from within it. It is cold to the touch even beside open flame, a vessel that once housed a soul and has never forgotten the absence.

bone_arrow.name: bone arrow
bone_arrow.sprite_desc: A slender arrow carved entirely from yellowed bone with a needle-sharp tip
bone_arrow.lore: Carved from the archer's own ribs and fletched with splinters of finger-bone, this arrow was never meant for the living. It carries a faint resonance of necromantic purpose, and apothecaries claim its marrow-dust can be rendered into a preparation that sharpens aim beyond mortal limits.

crystal_residue.name: crystal residue
crystal_residue.sprite_desc: A glistening cluster of translucent blue-white crystal fragments in a pool of clear gel
crystal_residue.lore: A crust of prismatic mineral scraped from the ooze's translucent hide, refracting torchlight into cold rainbows across dungeon walls. Alchemists prize it as a binding agent capable of suspending other compounds in a state of prolonged, crystalline potency.

toxic_jelly_sac.name: toxic jelly sac
toxic_jelly_sac.sprite_desc: A bulging translucent green sac of corrosive jelly, wobbling with each movement
toxic_jelly_sac.lore: A small, pulsing membrane of vivid green, swollen with the concentrated venom that saturates every cell of the jelly's body. It weeps a faintly sweet-smelling fluid along its seams, a deceptive perfume that masks the swift corruption within.

scorpion_venom_sac.name: scorpion venom sac
scorpion_venom_sac.sprite_desc: A tough amber-colored venom sac with a sharp stinger still attached at one end
scorpion_venom_sac.lore: Harvested from the stinger of a beast large enough to shadow a horse, this bulging amber sac holds enough hemotoxin to unmake a company of soldiers. It is warm to the touch, trembling slightly as if the venom within still searches for prey.

wild_thyme.name: wild thyme
wild_thyme.lore: A hardy aromatic herb that grows in the cracks of dungeon walls. Cooks prize it as a versatile flavoring that subtly sharpens the senses.
wild_thyme.sprite_desc: A bundle of delicate green-grey thyme sprigs tied with twine, fragrant and fresh

rosemary_sprig.name: rosemary sprig
rosemary_sprig.lore: A woody-stemmed herb whose resinous scent has been known to ward off minor hexes. Adventurers crush it in their palms before entering cursed chambers.
rosemary_sprig.sprite_desc: A woody sprig of dark green rosemary needles with tiny pale blue flowers

valerian_root.name: valerian root
valerian_root.lore: A gnarled root with sedative properties. Herbalists dry and powder it to calm nerves; master cooks transmute it into a potent focus-enhancing tonic.
valerian_root.sprite_desc: A gnarled pale brown root with stringy tendrils, smelling of earth and sleep

nightshade_leaf.name: nightshade leaf
nightshade_leaf.lore: A deep-violet leaf from a poisonous plant. In small, precisely cooked doses it sharpens reflexes to a razor edge—but miscalculate and the result is lethal.
nightshade_leaf.sprite_desc: A single heart-shaped leaf of deep purple-black with veins that glow faintly violet

mandrake_root.name: mandrake root
mandrake_root.lore: A humanoid-shaped root infamous for its screech when pulled. Ground and slow-roasted by an expert cook, it imparts a formidable boost to raw physical power.
mandrake_root.sprite_desc: A twisted humanoid-shaped root of pale brown, its surface etched with tiny screaming faces

cave_mushroom.name: cave mushroom
cave_mushroom.lore: A pale, plump mushroom grown in the darkness of deep caverns. Bland on its own, but a skilled cook can render it into a surprisingly nourishing meal.
cave_mushroom.sprite_desc: A plump off-white mushroom with a broad cap, speckled with bits of cave sediment

pale_celery.name: pale celery
pale_celery.lore: Etiolated celery stalks that grow in underground streams. Water-rich and faintly bitter, they form the base of many dungeon soups.
pale_celery.sprite_desc: A stalk of ghostly pale celery grown in total darkness, crisp and translucent

cave_carrot.name: cave carrot
cave_carrot.lore: Orange roots that somehow flourish in dimly lit passages. Rich in subterranean minerals, they are said to grant keen eyesight in the dark.
cave_carrot.sprite_desc: A stubby bright orange carrot pulled from underground soil, still dusted with dark earth

glowing_spore.name: glowing spore
glowing_spore.lore: A bioluminescent spore cluster that pulses with soft blue-green light. Ingesting it in a refined preparation briefly heightens magical sensitivity.
glowing_spore.sprite_desc: A luminous blue-green spore cluster pulsing with soft bioluminescent light

crimson_fungus.name: crimson fungus
crimson_fungus.lore: Blood-red caps with a fiery bite. Herbalists warn never to eat these raw—the toxins must be rendered harmless through careful cooking before the energizing compounds can be safely absorbed.
crimson_fungus.sprite_desc: A vivid red mushroom cap with white spots, its underside dripping crimson spores

petrified_mushroom.name: petrified mushroom
petrified_mushroom.lore: Ancient fungi turned to near-stone over centuries of mineral exposure. Ground to a fine dust and boiled, they yield a broth of remarkable fortifying properties.
petrified_mushroom.sprite_desc: A stone-hard mushroom turned to grey mineral, its cap still showing fossilized gills

ember_spice.name: ember spice
ember_spice.lore: Tiny flakes of solidified volcanic mineral, glowing faintly orange. Sprinkled into a dish they intensify flavors and imbue a transient heat-resistance.
ember_spice.sprite_desc: A small clay pot of brilliant orange-red spice powder that smolders with faint heat

serpent_pepper.name: serpent pepper
serpent_pepper.lore: A slender, venomously-hot pepper found near serpent dens. Cooking neutralizes its toxins and leaves behind a compound that sharpens dexterity for hours.
serpent_pepper.sprite_desc: A twisted dark green pepper pod shaped like a coiled snake, intensely hot

void_salt.name: void salt
void_salt.lore: Crystallized residue from extra-planar rifts. A grain transforms any dish into something otherworldly—and grants brief resistance to necrotic energies.
void_salt.sprite_desc: A pouch of deep indigo-black crystalline salt that seems to swallow nearby light

dragon_salt.name: dragon salt
dragon_salt.lore: Crystalline deposits found only in dragon lairs, formed when draconic flame meets limestone. Chefs who master its use produce meals of legendary restorative power.
dragon_salt.sprite_desc: Brilliant golden crystalline salt that sparkles like molten treasure in any light

swamp_serpent_fang.name: swamp serpent fang
swamp_serpent_fang.sprite_desc: A curved yellow-green fang dripping with brackish swamp venom
swamp_serpent_fang.lore: A curved ivory fang still wet with the hemotoxic venom that caused flesh to blacken and blood to thicken in its wake. Held to the light, a faint greenish residue clings to the hollow channel within, patient and purposeful as the serpent itself.

blink_gland.name: blink gland
blink_gland.sprite_desc: A pulsating lavender organ that flickers in and out of visibility
blink_gland.lore: A pearlescent nodule taken from behind the blink dog's shoulder blade, still flickering with residual spatial energy that makes the fingers holding it feel briefly elsewhere. Enchanters speak of distilling it into preparations that let a body slip, for just a heartbeat, between one place and another.

eagle_feather.name: eagle feather
eagle_feather.sprite_desc: A broad tawny-gold eagle feather with a sharp white tip and powerful barbs
eagle_feather.lore: A primary feather from a giant eagle's wing, silver-white at the quill and edged in bronze at the tip, carrying the cold clean scent of high mountain air far above the dungeon's rot. Legends hold that a feather freely given by such a creature grants clarity of vision and purpose—but this one was taken by force, and its counsel may be less generous.

wisp_essence.name: wisp essence
wisp_essence.sprite_desc: A tiny glass sphere containing a flickering pale blue-white light that dances within
wisp_essence.lore: A faintly glowing mote of cold blue-white light trapped in a stoppered vial, the distilled lure of a creature that fed on despair. It pulses rhythmically like a false heartbeat, and alchemists warn that its luminescence is most potent—and most treacherous—in absolute darkness.

spriggan_thorn.name: spriggan thorn
spriggan_thorn.sprite_desc: A woody green thorn the size of a dagger, alive with crawling vine tendrils
spriggan_thorn.lore: A barbed thorn the length of a finger, shed when the spriggan swelled to monstrous size, still rigid with the wild magic of fae expansion. It pricks the palm with a sting disproportionate to its size, as if it remembers the enormity it once belonged to.

violet_fungus_cap.name: violet fungus cap
violet_fungus_cap.sprite_desc: A fleshy purple mushroom cap with writhing tentacle-like gills underneath
violet_fungus_cap.lore: A deep amethyst cap ringed with bioluminescent spores that drift lazily upward when disturbed, carrying the sweet, sickly smell of accelerated decay. Herbalists who can stomach the harvest find its flesh, when carefully dried and neutralized, a potent ingredient in preparations that reverse rot and restore what has begun to wither.

lamia_scales.name: lamia scales
lamia_scales.sprite_desc: A handful of golden-bronze scales with a hypnotic iridescent pattern
lamia_scales.lore: Torn from the serpentine coils of Hera's most pitiless curse, these scales shimmer between deep olive and burnished gold, each one edged in grief as old as Olympus. They are said to carry within them a hunger that never fully fades, and those who craft with them must take care not to mistake the ingredient's longing for their own.

wolf_pelt.name: wolf pelt
wolf_pelt.sprite_desc: A thick patch of grey-brown wolf fur, dense and warm with a wild musky scent
wolf_pelt.lore: The thick grey pelt of a creature whose lineage traces back to the wolf that will swallow the sun, already unnaturally dense and warm for a beast so young. To wear it is to feel something vast and patient breathing at the edge of your awareness, as though Ragnarök is not an event but a presence that has always been close.

nothic_eye.name: nothic eye
nothic_eye.sprite_desc: A large bloodshot eye with a slit pupil, still twitching with mad awareness
nothic_eye.lore: A single enormous eye, pale yellow shot through with ruptured red vessels, taken from a thing that once called itself a scholar. It does not decay as flesh should, and those who hold it too long report the creeping certainty that it is still reading them, cataloguing every secret they have tried to forget.

enchanted_plate.name: enchanted plate
enchanted_plate.sprite_desc: A shard of animated steel armor plate with faint blue runes still glowing
enchanted_plate.lore: A breastplate wrenched from a suit of armor that fought long after its master crumbled to dust, still warm from the animating force that refused to release it. The metal bears no rust and accepts no new dents, as though whatever will inhabited it has left behind only its stubbornness.

shaman_totem.name: shaman totem
shaman_totem.sprite_desc: A carved wooden totem of stacked animal heads, daubed with ritual paint
shaman_totem.lore: A carved effigy of intertwined reptilian spirits, worn smooth by the shaman's grip and stained dark with ritual pigments ground from poisonous roots. It hums faintly when held near venom or open wounds, as if the primal spirits bound within still hunger to be invoked.

kuo_toa_slime.name: kuo-toa slime
kuo_toa_slime.sprite_desc: A jar of iridescent teal-green fish slime that shifts through rainbow colors
kuo_toa_slime.lore: A thick, iridescent mucus that clings to anything it touches with unsettling persistence, smelling of deep water and something else entirely—something that has no name in any surface language. The kuo-toa secrete it as offering and armor alike, and those of unsound mind sometimes claim it whispers the names of gods that have not yet been dreamed.

cockatrice_beak.name: cockatrice beak
cockatrice_beak.sprite_desc: A sharp hooked beak of stone-grey keratin with petrifying residue on its edge
cockatrice_beak.lore: A hooked, ivory-grey beak chipped from the cockatrice's rooster-skull, still carrying a mineral chill that makes the surrounding air taste faintly of turned stone. Even severed and still, a scratch from its serrated edge leaves the skin pale and oddly rigid for hours, as if the flesh cannot quite decide whether to forget what touched it.

grick_hide.name: grick hide
grick_hide.sprite_desc: A rubbery section of mottled grey-green hide covered in tiny suction cups
grick_hide.lore: A rubbery, stone-grey hide riddled with the natural striations of cavern rock. So perfectly does it mimic the texture of granite that even a practiced hand, running fingers across it, feels a moment of doubt.

ghast_ichor.name: ghast ichor
ghast_ichor.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of putrid yellow-green fluid that paralyzes living tissue on contact
ghast_ichor.lore: A thin, reeking fluid the color of old bile, weeping from the wounds of a creature that was never quite dead enough to forget cunning. Its stench alone is said to paralyze the senses of those who breathe too deeply.

false_holy_relic.name: false holy relic
false_holy_relic.sprite_desc: A tarnished gold medallion radiating false divine warmth, cracked down the center
false_holy_relic.lore: A shard of bone or splinter of sanctified wood that radiates a faint, sickly warmth — the ghost of faith long since corrupted. Those who study divine mysteries say it hums with the frequency of a prayer twisted inside out.

phase_silk.name: phase silk
phase_silk.sprite_desc: A shimmering fabric of purple-silver silk that phases between solid and translucent
phase_silk.lore: Threads harvested from a spider that exists only half in this world, the silk shimmers and blurs at the edges as if refusing to fully commit to reality. Weavers of the arcane prize it for garments that slip between states of being.

python_scales.name: python scales
python_scales.sprite_desc: A strip of large overlapping olive-green scales with a muscular hide backing
python_scales.lore: Broad, earth-brown scales worn smooth against tunnel stone, each one a little shield unto itself. They carry a faint mineral musk from years pressed against cold rock, and still hold the coiled patience of their former owner.

heartwood_sap.name: heartwood sap
heartwood_sap.sprite_desc: A flask of rich amber-gold sap that glows with the vitality of ancient forests
heartwood_sap.lore: Golden-green and viscous, this sap bleeds from the heartwood of a tree that was also a woman. It smells of turned earth after spring rain and carries within it the deep, slow memory of centuries of growth.

assassin_vine_sap.name: assassin vine sap
assassin_vine_sap.sprite_desc: A dark green viscous sap that coils and reaches toward nearby warmth
assassin_vine_sap.lore: A pale jade fluid squeezed from tendrils that knew how to wait. It dries to a tacky film that clings like intention, and those who handle it report a strange stillness settling over their limbs, as if the sap remembers the hunt.

carbuncle_gem.name: carbuncle gem
carbuncle_gem.sprite_desc: A luminous ruby-red gemstone that was once embedded in a living creature's forehead
carbuncle_gem.lore: A faceted stone torn from the brow of a fox-quick creature, still faintly warm and pulsing with trapped prismatic light. Jewelers and illusionists alike covet it, for it holds sunbursts within its depths like bottled blindness.

bronze_hide_strip.name: bronze hide strip
bronze_hide_strip.sprite_desc: A strip of metallic bronze-scaled hide that rings like metal when struck
bronze_hide_strip.lore: A rigid strip of metallic hide from the bull-bodied beasts that ancient sources claimed arose from the earth of Ares. It smells of hot copper and carries a faint petrifying residue that makes the fingers tingle and stiffen at the joints.

world_serpent_scale.name: world serpent scale
world_serpent_scale.sprite_desc: A large emerald-green scale with shifting cosmic patterns visible in its depth
world_serpent_scale.lore: A scale the size of a buckler, dark green shading to void-black at the edges, still faintly salted with the brine of world-encircling seas. It is said that anything wrapped in it becomes, briefly, as patient and inexorable as fate itself.

solar_venom.name: solar venom
solar_venom.sprite_desc: A radiant golden vial of liquid sunlight venom that burns shadows on contact
solar_venom.lore: A luminous amber toxin gathered from a serpent that guards the solar barque against the chaos of the outer dark. It burns cold against the skin and smells of desert noon, equal parts brilliant and lethal as the sun it served.

hero_hound_pelt.name: hero hound pelt
hero_hound_pelt.sprite_desc: A patch of noble golden-brown hound fur with an aura of loyalty and courage
hero_hound_pelt.lore: A pelt of unusual warmth and uncanny softness, the grey-silver of Irish mist, carrying a loyalty in its very fibers that once bound it as much to kin as to hunt. Those who sleep beneath it are said to dream of a green island and the sound of the chase.

shadow_essence.name: shadow essence
shadow_essence.sprite_desc: A small black crystal vial containing liquid darkness that writhes and recoils from light
shadow_essence.lore: A vial of absolute darkness that shifts and presses against the glass as if seeking a way out. Harvested from a demon that chose to surrender its form entirely, it chills the hand that holds it and dims every candle in the room.

ochre_extract.name: ochre extract
ochre_extract.sprite_desc: A thick amber-yellow gel that slowly dissolves anything organic it touches
ochre_extract.lore: A thick, amber-yellow fluid that smells sharply of dissolved stone and digested bone. Even diluted and carefully neutralized by a skilled hand, it retains a faint corrosive tingle on the tongue — a reminder of what it was made to unmake.

pack_lord_skull.name: pack lord skull
pack_lord_skull.sprite_desc: A large gnoll skull with filed fangs and tribal scarification carved into the bone
pack_lord_skull.lore: A massive, battle-scarred skull reeking of blood-iron and old violence, its hyena-broad jaw still locked in the snarl that commanded a warband. Shamans say it pulses with residual dominance, and weaker creatures grow uneasy in its presence.

ettercap_silk.name: ettercap silk
ettercap_silk.sprite_desc: A bundle of strong purple-grey silk webbing with a faint magical shimmer
ettercap_silk.lore: Grey-brown cord, hand-spun by fingers that were once almost human, tougher than rope and sticky in a way that soap and water cannot quite resolve. It smells of the midden-floor of a spider's nest and holds knots that seem to tighten of their own accord.

jiangshi_essence.name: jiangshi essence
jiangshi_essence.sprite_desc: A paper talisman soaked in pale blue-green ectoplasmic fluid, still twitching
jiangshi_essence.lore: A pale, cold mist compressed through dark ritual into viscous droplets that smell faintly of incense and old grave-clay. It carries the stolen vitality of a dozen stolen breaths, and handlers report their own limbs growing briefly stiff and cold.

barrow_dust.name: barrow dust
barrow_dust.sprite_desc: Ancient grey dust from a burial mound, mixed with crumbled gold leaf and bone
barrow_dust.lore: Fine grey-brown powder sifted from the crumbling form of a king who refused to stop keeping watch. It smells of burial earth, corroded bronze, and the specific silence of a sealed tomb, and clings to the skin long after it seems to have been brushed away.

hollow_essence.name: hollow essence
hollow_essence.sprite_desc: A glass orb of perfectly clear liquid that weighs nothing and reflects no light
hollow_essence.lore: A colorless, almost weightless residue that evaporates from the remains of one who bartered away the very thing that made them whole. It leaves a faint impression of hunger on any vessel that holds it, as if the container itself begins to want.

charnel_fang.name: charnel fang
charnel_fang.sprite_desc: A massive yellowed canine tooth stained with old blood and smelling of the charnel pit
charnel_fang.lore: A yellowed fang assembled from mismatched bone, still carrying the scent-memory of a hundred trails it was shaped to follow. It is cold to the touch in a way that has nothing to do with temperature, and points subtly toward the nearest dead thing.

mantis_foreleg.name: mantis foreleg
mantis_foreleg.sprite_desc: A segmented green foreleg with a razor-sharp serrated inner edge for slicing prey
mantis_foreleg.lore: The serrated foreleg of a giant mantis, still faintly twitching with predatory reflex. Alchemists prize its tendons for distillations said to gift the drinker with preternatural swiftness and the patience of a perfect hunter.

basilisk_eye.name: basilisk eye
basilisk_eye.sprite_desc: A clouded amber eye with a vertical pupil, still radiating faint petrification magic
basilisk_eye.lore: Plucked from a lesser basilisk, this clouded orb swims with a pale, calcifying light that has not yet learned to fully kill. It is said that one who consumes it prepared correctly gains a gaze of terrible weight—heavy enough to root enemies in momentary dread.

winter_wolf_pelt.name: winter wolf pelt
winter_wolf_pelt.sprite_desc: A luxurious coat of pure white fur with ice crystals woven permanently into each strand
winter_wolf_pelt.lore: A thick, silver-white hide that radiates cold even hours after the beast's death, carrying the faint reek of glacier ice and old blood. Stitched into a cloak by skilled hands, it is rumored to breathe killing frost upon those who threaten the wearer.

death_dog_fang.name: death dog fang
death_dog_fang.sprite_desc: A double-pointed fang from a two-headed death dog, blackened with necrotic poison
death_dog_fang.lore: A curved, yellowed fang from one of the two jaws of a fiendish death dog, streaked black with the supernatural rot it carried. Even cleaned and dried it exudes a faint charnel sweetness—alchemists render it into preparations said to accelerate or arrest decay.

tengu_feather.name: tengu feather
tengu_feather.sprite_desc: A jet-black crow feather with a metallic blue edge, cut like a blade
tengu_feather.lore: A glossy black feather from a tengu warrior, iridescent as a crow's wing in candlelight and sharp-edged enough to draw blood. Masters of the culinary blade claim that a broth seasoned with its essence sharpens the reflexes to the edge of a master swordsman's steel.

musk_pollen.name: musk pollen
musk_pollen.sprite_desc: A pouch of brilliant yellow pollen that induces euphoria and suggestibility when inhaled
musk_pollen.lore: A dense, waxy powder harvested from the yellow musk creeper, glowing faintly amber and sweetly narcotic in scent. Even a pinch inhaled without preparation clouds the mind like warm honey poured over thought—but a trained cook can reverse its stupefying gifts into something clarifying.

cyclops_eye.name: cyclops eye
cyclops_eye.sprite_desc: A massive single eye the size of a fist, amber-orange with a horizontal pupil
cyclops_eye.lore: A vast, amber-irised eye from a son of Poseidon, still wet with the sea-smell its owner carried from his coastal cave. Legend holds that the single vision of the Cyclopes pierced illusion and lies—and that something of that brutal clarity survives in the cooling orb.

griffin_feather.name: griffin feather
griffin_feather.sprite_desc: A magnificent golden-brown feather tipped with white, radiating noble pride
griffin_feather.lore: A long primary feather from a griffin's wing, gold-tipped and impossibly stiff, smelling of sunlit mountain heights and something faintly divine. Sacred to Apollo, such feathers were once woven into crowns for those deemed worthy of godly favor.

corrupted_elf_dust.name: corrupted elf dust
corrupted_elf_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of once-luminous silver dust now tainted with creeping purple corruption
corrupted_elf_dust.lore: What remains of a Light Elf's radiance after darkness has curdled it—a fine, ash-grey powder that stings the fingers like cold iron and smells of something beautiful gone wrong. In careful measure it is said to carry both illumination and shadow, a balance as treacherous as Loki's counsel.

crocodile_hide.name: crocodile hide
crocodile_hide.sprite_desc: A section of thick ridged crocodilian hide in dark olive-green, nearly impenetrable
crocodile_hide.lore: A plated slab of hide from a warrior of Sobek, dark green and river-smooth on one face, rough as ancient stone on the other. It carries the damp weight of the Nile—power, fertility, and the casual violence of a god who sees little difference between protection and predation.

desert_sand_essence.name: desert sand essence
desert_sand_essence.sprite_desc: A glass vial of golden sand that flows upward and whispers in dead languages
desert_sand_essence.lore: A vial of shimmering reddish dust condensed from a Desert Wraith, smelling of dry heat and the vast silence of the Red Land where Set holds dominion. Those who dare consume it in precise preparation find it burns away impurity and weakness—and sometimes, dangerously, more than that.

demon_ichor.name: demon ichor
demon_ichor.sprite_desc: A sealed bronze flask of bubbling black-red ichor that corrodes lesser containers
demon_ichor.lore: The viscous, brass-colored ichor of a Pazuzu Spawn, warm to the touch and smelling of scorched wind and dead locusts. Paradoxically, practitioners of apotropaic arts prize it as both bane and ward—for Pazuzu himself was invoked against the very evils he embodied.

mouther_ichor.name: mouther ichor
mouther_ichor.sprite_desc: A jar of grey-pink fleshy fluid with dozens of tiny embedded eyes staring outward
mouther_ichor.lore: A thick, eye-flecked fluid weeping from the gibbering mouther's many wounds, smelling of madness given form—copper, rot, and something that has no name. Alchemists who work with it in sealed chambers report that even its silence afterwards feels like a whisper.

clockwork_gear.name: clockwork gear
clockwork_gear.sprite_desc: A precision brass gear with microscopic rune engravings on every tooth
clockwork_gear.lore: A precise brass gear from a clockwork horror's inner workings, its teeth still clicking faintly as if searching for something to mesh with. Artificers claim it holds a residual animating principle—a tiny, relentless hunger to keep turning long after its maker is gone.

owlbear_feather.name: owlbear feather
owlbear_feather.sprite_desc: A large brown feather with a downy base and an owl-like pattern, smelling of musk
owlbear_feather.lore: A coarse, brown-banded feather that is somehow both downy and bristling, carrying the sour musk of bear and the sharp, clean scent of owl. It is the emblem of a creature that knows only rage, and renders into preparations of formidable, if unruly, vigor.

otyugh_organ.name: otyugh organ
otyugh_organ.sprite_desc: A bloated grey-green organ sac that reeks of refuse and pulses with bacterial life
otyugh_organ.lore: A glistening internal organ harvested from an otyugh's refuse-fed body, slick and pungent with the concentrated essence of everything the dungeon discards. Remarkably, herbalists who brave the stench find it rich in putrefied compounds that, properly rendered, accelerate the body's own healing processes.

phase_spider_venom.name: phase spider venom
phase_spider_venom.sprite_desc: A vial of shimmering purple venom that blinks between dimensions inside the glass
phase_spider_venom.lore: A shimmering, translucent venom that seems to shift between opalescent and invisible depending on the angle of light, smelling faintly of cold static and distant storms. It carries the memory of the ethereal plane within it—and those who survive its preparation claim the boundaries between here and elsewhere grow briefly, terrifyingly thin.

vrykolakas_heart.name: vrykolakas heart
vrykolakas_heart.sprite_desc: A blackened undead heart that still beats slowly, leaking dark blood
vrykolakas_heart.lore: A swollen, dark-red heart from a Greek vrykolakas, still disturbingly warm and heavy with stolen blood that will not properly clot. Ancient rites demanded it be pierced with iron and burned at a crossroads—but cooks of darker persuasion know that its blood, prepared correctly, imparts a dreadful, borrowed vitality.

thrall_bone.name: thrall bone
thrall_bone.sprite_desc: A thin grey bone inscribed with binding runes, warm to the touch from residual necromancy
thrall_bone.lore: A yellowed bone from a lich's thrall, carved involuntarily with minute channels through which the lich's will once flowed like dark current. It retains a cold, humming intelligence—ground fine, it finds its way into preparations said to sharpen the mind to a terrible, remorseless edge.

witch_bone.name: witch bone
witch_bone.sprite_desc: A finger bone wrapped in silver wire and tiny charm beads, humming with hex magic
witch_bone.lore: A finger bone from a Bone Witch, lacquered dark by centuries of ritual and smelling of grave-wax and old power. These women chose the permanence of death over the frailty of life—and something of that ferocious, calculating will has petrified within the bone itself.

crypt_dust.name: crypt dust
crypt_dust.sprite_desc: A vial of grey teleportation dust from a crypt thing, crackling with spatial energy
crypt_dust.lore: Fine grey powder that settles where a Crypt Thing dissolves, carrying the cold silence of sealed tombs. Alchemists whisper it can obscure a soul's presence from the dead, as though one never passed through at all.

guardian_bone.name: guardian bone
guardian_bone.sprite_desc: A thick reinforced bone etched with protective wards, still faintly glowing blue
guardian_bone.lore: The dense, oath-hardened bone of a warrior who chose eternal vigil over rest. It hums faintly with unbroken purpose, and those who hold it feel the ghost of a sworn duty pressing against their palms.

gibbering_essence.name: gibbering essence
gibbering_essence.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of writhing pink flesh-fluid that babbles incoherently when disturbed
gibbering_essence.lore: A viscous, iridescent fluid extracted from the half-formed mouths of the gibbering slime, still murmuring fragments of words that never quite resolve into meaning. Even stoppered in a vial, it unsettles the mind of anyone who listens too closely.

komodo_venom_gland.name: komodo venom gland
komodo_venom_gland.sprite_desc: A leathery brown gland packed with bacterial venom that causes rapid infection
komodo_venom_gland.lore: A bloated, sour-smelling gland from the komodo brute's pestilent maw, swollen with bacteria so virulent they blur the line between venom and disease. Patient cooks extract trace amounts to craft draughts that endure long after the meal is forgotten.

lion_meat.name: lion meat
lion_meat.sprite_desc: A thick slab of dark red lion meat with powerful muscle fibers, rich and gamey
lion_meat.lore: Dark, iron-rich flesh from the dire lion, carrying the faint electric charge of a beast whose roar once trembled stone ceilings. Those who consume it properly prepared are said to wear the predator's courage like a second skin.

roc_egg_fragment.name: roc egg fragment
roc_egg_fragment.sprite_desc: A curved shard of enormous eggshell, thick as pottery and veined with pale gold
roc_egg_fragment.lore: A curved shard of pale shell, thick as a fortress wall and faintly warm, still radiating the unborn storm of a roc's potential. Ground fine, it carries a concentrated vitality that speaks of creatures whose shadows blot out the sun.

redcap_blood.name: redcap blood
redcap_blood.sprite_desc: A vial of unnaturally bright crimson blood that never dries, constantly wet and fresh
redcap_blood.lore: Shockingly vivid crimson blood that refuses to dry or dull, pulsing with the fey rage that keeps a redcap alive through any wound. It reeks of iron and old murder, and herbalists handle it with lead-lined gloves.

elemental_air_core.name: elemental air core
elemental_air_core.sprite_desc: A swirling sphere of compressed wind contained in a thin crystal shell, humming
elemental_air_core.lore: A compressed mote of perpetual wind that writhes in the hand like a trapped breath, invisible yet unmistakable—cold, sharp, and smelling of lightning before it strikes. It is the distilled will of a storm given brief, dangerous form.

peryton_antler.name: peryton antler
peryton_antler.sprite_desc: A branching antler of pale bone-white with dried blood staining its tines
peryton_antler.lore: A tine shed from the peryton's great rack, casting a shadow shaped like a human hand no matter the angle of the light. Seers covet it as an instrument of ill omen, claiming it points always toward the nearest mortal death.

giant_marrow.name: giant marrow
giant_marrow.sprite_desc: A massive bone cracked open to reveal rich yellow marrow the size of a loaf
giant_marrow.lore: Thick, yellowish marrow scooped from the cavernous femur of a hill giant, rich with crude, earthen vitality. A skilled cook renders it into a hearty broth whose restorative warmth spreads to the very roots of the bones.

yuan_ti_venom_sac.name: yuan-ti venom sac
yuan_ti_venom_sac.sprite_desc: A serpentine venom gland with green-gold scales still attached, dripping clear poison
yuan_ti_venom_sac.lore: A pearl-grey sac of cold, opalescent venom from the yuan-ti, carrying traces of the dead serpent god's fading divinity. Distilled carefully, it is said to temporarily grant the drinker the cold clarity of a mind that has shed all human sentiment.

winged_mane.name: winged mane
winged_mane.sprite_desc: A flowing lock of pure white horse mane hair that drifts upward as if weightless
winged_mane.lore: A hank of coarse, shadow-soaked hair from the corrupted pegasus, once white as cloud but now threaded with veins of absolute black. It carries the ghost of divine swiftness twisted into something predatory and unbound.

lindworm_skin.name: lindworm skin
lindworm_skin.sprite_desc: A shed skin of emerald-green dragon-kin, translucent and surprisingly tough
lindworm_skin.lore: A vast, interlocking scale-skin from the Norse serpent-dragon, tough as cured iron and reeking of venom and old river water. According to legend, only willing sacrifice can undo a lindworm's curse—and something of that desperate magic still clings to the shed hide.

embalming_resin.name: embalming resin
embalming_resin.sprite_desc: A block of golden-brown resin wrapped in linen strips, fragrant with sacred oils
embalming_resin.lore: Amber-dark resin harvested from an Anubis Guardian's wrappings, fragrant with natron, cedar, and the dry breath of the underworld. It preserves whatever it touches against decay, as though Ma'at herself has weighed it worthy of eternity.

each_uisce_mane.name: each uisce mane
each_uisce_mane.sprite_desc: A lock of waterlogged black-blue mane hair that drips endlessly and smells of the sea
each_uisce_mane.lore: A thick lock of kelp-tangled mane from the Each Uisce, perpetually wet and smelling of deep salt water and something older beneath it. Folklore holds that carrying it prevents drowning—though the Water Horse's gifts are rarely given without eventual price.

ugallu_claw.name: ugallu claw
ugallu_claw.sprite_desc: A massive curved claw of dark brown horn, cracked and scarred from battle
ugallu_claw.lore: A hooked, storm-grey talon from the Ugallu's bird-footed leg, still crackling faintly with the authority of Mesopotamian tempests. The servants of Enlil were said to drag the wicked before divine judgment, and something of that compulsion lingers in the curved bone.

kusarikku_horn.name: kusarikku horn
kusarikku_horn.sprite_desc: A heavy ridged horn of deep amber, warm to the touch and carved with Sumerian glyphs
kusarikku_horn.lore: A broad, polished horn from the Bull-Man of Akkadian legend, once carried by divine gatekeepers who stood between the mortal world and the sacred. It is warm to the touch and resonates with a low, steadying hum—an echo of the threshold it was born to guard.

grell_tentacle.name: grell tentacle
grell_tentacle.sprite_desc: A severed grey-green tentacle lined with paralytic barbs, still twitching
grell_tentacle.lore: A writhing, barbed limb severed from the floating grell, still twitching with residual paralytic charge long after the creature's death. The colourless fluid weeping from its tip is prized by apothecaries willing to work quickly and without bare skin.

infernal_perfume.name: infernal perfume
infernal_perfume.sprite_desc: An ornate black bottle of intoxicating perfume that smells different to each person
infernal_perfume.lore: An oily, hypnotic essence extracted from the incubus's skin, smelling impossibly of whatever the harvester finds most alluring—warm amber, rain on stone, a remembered embrace. It is beautiful, persuasive, and deeply untrustworthy.

devil_glaive_shard.name: devil glaive shard
devil_glaive_shard.sprite_desc: A jagged shard of infernal black iron still glowing dull red along its edge
devil_glaive_shard.lore: A jagged fragment of the bearded devil's infernal blade, black iron that never quite cools and edges that fester rather than cut clean. Even separated from the weapon, it resists any magic that would knit wounds shut, as though Hell itself refuses to let go.

lurker_skin.name: lurker skin
lurker_skin.sprite_desc: A paper-thin membrane of mottled brown that mimics stone and ceiling textures
lurker_skin.lore: A flat, grey-brown membrane that mimics the texture of dressed stone with unnerving precision, still faintly warm from the body heat it absorbed waiting for prey. Alchemists prize it as a binding material, for nothing adheres more stubbornly—or conceals more perfectly—than the skin of a creature whose entire existence was disguise.

mineral_shard.name: mineral shard
mineral_shard.sprite_desc: A faceted crystal of mixed precious minerals: gold, silver, and gems fused together
mineral_shard.lore: A dense, tri-faceted fragment torn from the body of a creature that phased through solid rock as easily as a fish through water, faintly humming with the resonance of the Elemental Plane. It smells of deep granite and ancient metal, and those who hold it long enough claim to feel veins of ore pulsing beneath the dungeon floor.

hook_horror_hook.name: hook horror hook
hook_horror_hook.sprite_desc: A massive bone hook the length of a forearm, curved and wickedly sharp
hook_horror_hook.lore: A massive, chitinous hook the color of tarnished iron, serrated along its inner curve and still faintly clicking in the hollow acoustics of the dungeon as though sending messages to kin that will never answer. It is said that a blade edged with shards of this material finds purchase in even the most stubborn stone.

strigoi_fang.name: strigoi fang
strigoi_fang.sprite_desc: An elongated ivory fang with dried blood in its hollow channel, radiating cold
strigoi_fang.lore: A hollow, needle-thin fang from one of the undying wicked, curved like a crescent and perpetually cold to the touch, carrying the faint reek of burial earth and old transgression. Eastern herbalists warn that anything prepared with it inherits a dual nature—capable of sustaining life or slowly, inexorably, draining it.

death_mage_phylactery.name: death mage phylactery
death_mage_phylactery.sprite_desc: A small obsidian box etched with death runes, pulsing with trapped soul energy
death_mage_phylactery.lore: A small, black-lacquered vessel etched with necromantic sigils, warm in a way no dead thing should be, containing something that pulses faintly against its walls like a heartbeat interrupted mid-transformation. It represents a bargain half-made with oblivion—and those who traffic in such things say the other half is always eventually collected.

mohrg_organ.name: mohrg organ
mohrg_organ.sprite_desc: A purple-red muscular tongue-organ studded with paralytic barbs
mohrg_organ.lore: A slick, purplish mass of preserved viscera from a creature animated by sheer murderous will rather than any dark god's blessing, still faintly twitching with the impulses that drove its host in life and in death. Necromancers handle it with iron tongs, for the violence compressed within it is said to be contagious.

death_beetle_ichor.name: death beetle ichor
death_beetle_ichor.sprite_desc: A vial of deep purple-black beetle ichor that dims nearby light sources
death_beetle_ichor.lore: A thick, lightless fluid that seeps from the obsidian carapace of the death beetle, so deeply black it seems to swallow the glow of any torch brought near it, carrying the cold sweet smell of a tomb sealed for centuries. Poured into flame, it extinguishes it utterly—and in the darkness that follows, things are said to move.

lycanthrope_blood.name: lycanthrope blood
lycanthrope_blood.sprite_desc: A flask of dark blood that shifts between human red and bestial amber with the light
lycanthrope_blood.lore: A crimson fluid that refuses to fully congeal, still shimmering faintly silver in the light as though the moon herself has left a fingerprint in it. Alchemists have long sought to separate the beast's ferocity from its curse, with results that are, at best, incomplete.

hag_eye.name: hag eye
hag_eye.sprite_desc: A milky green eye that still sees, swiveling to track movement when uncovered
hag_eye.lore: A jaundiced, milky orb plucked from the sunken socket of a green hag, smelling of peat water and spite, swirling with the residue of illusions that made ugliness look like grace. It is said that suspended in oil and held over a flame, it reveals the true face of whatever stands before the one who peers through it.

elemental_water_core.name: elemental water core
elemental_water_core.sprite_desc: A perfect sphere of living water that hovers slightly above any surface
elemental_water_core.lore: A sphere of perpetually churning liquid that never spills and never stills, cold enough to burn the hand that holds it, pulled from the churning heart of a wave given terrible sentience. Masters of the cooking arts speak of broth made from it in hushed tones—purifying, they say, but also hungry.

troll_regeneration_gland.name: troll regeneration gland
troll_regeneration_gland.sprite_desc: A pulsing green organ that visibly regrows damaged tissue before your eyes
troll_regeneration_gland.lore: A slippery, pale organ threaded through with vessels that even now attempt to knit themselves closed, harvested from a creature that death could barely persuade to stay dead. Those who prepare it carefully claim the resulting preparation carries a ghost of that stubborn vitality—though only so long as it is kept well away from fire.

minotaur_horn.name: Minotaur Horn
minotaur_horn.lore: A massive curved horn from the Minotaur of Knossos. Radiates primal fury.
minotaur_horn.sprite_desc: A massive curved horn of dark crimson-brown, scarred from charging through stone walls

sphinx_mane.name: sphinx mane
sphinx_mane.sprite_desc: A lock of luxurious golden lion mane radiating ancient wisdom and desert heat
sphinx_mane.lore: A great rippling lock of tawny hair from the riddler who broke the pride of Thebes, still crackling faintly with the static of divine authority, smelling of desert noon and the copper tang of old blood. It is said that a wreath woven from it lends the wearer a terrible clarity of thought—provided they are willing to pay its price.

frost_giant_bone.name: frost giant bone
frost_giant_bone.sprite_desc: A femur of pale blue-white bone taller than a human, rimed with permanent frost
frost_giant_bone.lore: A massive shard of pale blue-white bone from a descendant of Ymir himself, dense as glacier ice and etched by millennia of cold with natural runes that no scholar has fully translated. It thrums faintly with the memory of Niflheim's howling dark, and those who carry it too long begin to dream of a world before the gods were born.

corruption_scale.name: corruption scale
corruption_scale.sprite_desc: A blackened dragon scale corroded with creeping purple-red corruption veins
corruption_scale.lore: A dark, iridescent scale from the brood of Níðhöggr, the gnawer who has never ceased its work at the roots of Yggdrasil, smelling faintly of rot and the slow dissolution of things that were meant to be eternal. Its edges are preternaturally sharp, and alchemists note that substances stored beside it begin, inexplicably, to decay.

sphinx_dust_gold.name: sphinx dust gold
sphinx_dust_gold.sprite_desc: Sacred golden dust from a sphinx guardian, each grain containing a fragment of a riddle
sphinx_dust_gold.lore: A fine, luminous powder that sifts from the hide of a creature who has kept vigil over royal tombs since before living memory, tasting of dry desert wind and sacred cedar resin. Unlike its Greek kin who traded in riddles, this dust carries the weight of divine judgment—and those who use it unworthily find fortune turns its back on them with unsettling speed.

thoth_ink.name: thoth ink
thoth_ink.sprite_desc: A vial of deep blue-black ink that writes words of power on its own when uncapped
thoth_ink.lore: A glossy, deep-blue fluid harvested from the construct of the Twice-Great, smelling of papyrus and bitumen, that forms letters of its own accord on any surface it touches before slowly fading. Scribes of the arcane arts believe that a single prepared drop, consumed at the moment of learning, seals the knowledge into the mind as permanently as Thoth's own records.

fomorian_bone.name: fomorian bone
fomorian_bone.sprite_desc: A massive twisted bone from a deformed giant, asymmetrical and covered in growths
fomorian_bone.lore: A vast, asymmetrical bone dense as sea-granite, dredged from one of the Chaos-born who warred against the bright gods before the world settled into its current shape, cold and faintly damp as the Irish winter. It radiates a sullen, primordial weight that dims nearby flames and makes animals refuse to enter rooms where it is kept.

cath_palug_claw.name: cath palug claw
cath_palug_claw.sprite_desc: A curved obsidian-black claw from the monstrous cat, still humming with feral power
cath_palug_claw.lore: A curved, obsidian-black claw from the Clawing Cat that laid waste to Anglesey, broader than a man's palm and still sharp enough to part chainmail like linen, smelling of wild sea-spray and fresh violence. Warriors who have mounted fragments of it to their blades speak of a savage, almost feral precision that comes over them in the thick of battle.

primordial_clay.name: primordial clay
primordial_clay.sprite_desc: A lump of ancient red-brown clay that reshapes itself when not being observed
primordial_clay.lore: A heavy, grey-green clod of matter from the body of Lahamu, shaped in the abyss before the sky and earth were yet divided, still faintly moist with the mingled waters of Apsu and Tiamat. It is said to hold the memory of all forms—pressed and baked by a skilled hand, it can become almost anything, though it always retains its taste of the deep and formless dark.

brain_lobe.name: brain lobe
brain_lobe.sprite_desc: A glistening pink-grey brain lobe floating in preservative fluid, pulsing with psionic energy
brain_lobe.lore: A glistening, rose-grey lobe that twitches faintly even after separation from its host, carrying the psychic residue of every mind the intellect devourer consumed—a palimpsest of stolen selves. Handled too long without precaution, it whispers fragments of thoughts that were never yours, and some of them are very difficult to give back.

cloaker_hide.name: cloaker hide
cloaker_hide.sprite_desc: A dark leathery hide that undulates on its own, mimicking a cloak or shadow
cloaker_hide.lore: A supple, velvet-dark membrane that shifts color like a living shadow, indistinguishable from fine cloth until it writhes in your hands. Tanners who work it claim it retains some memory of concealment, and cloaks sewn from it seem to drink in lamplight.

enchanted_clay.name: enchanted clay
enchanted_clay.sprite_desc: A block of smooth tan clay inscribed with the word of animation in Hebrew script
enchanted_clay.lore: Soft, ruddy clay still warm with the residue of animating magic, threaded through with veins of dull gold that pulse faintly in darkness. Alchemists prize it as a medium that remembers the shape of rage—useful, and deeply unstable.

displacer_hide.name: displacer hide
displacer_hide.sprite_desc: A sleek dark indigo hide that shimmers and appears several inches from where it actually is
displacer_hide.lore: The sleek, blue-black pelt of a displacer beast ripples strangely at the edge of vision, as though the hide itself refuses to be looked at directly. It is said that armor lined with it makes the wearer difficult to pin down, body and eye alike deceived.

black_ooze.name: black ooze
black_ooze.sprite_desc: A sealed obsidian jar of pitch-black ooze that dissolves anything except stone and glass
black_ooze.lore: A viscous, tar-dark substance that smells of dissolved iron and corroded wood, collected with clay vessels since no metal container survives it long. Even rendered down and neutralized, it retains a hungry quality—useful to those who would unmake rather than make.

trapper_membrane.name: trapper membrane
trapper_membrane.sprite_desc: A wide flat membrane of stone-colored skin that could cover an entire floor tile
trapper_membrane.lore: A broad, leathery sheet of grey-beige flesh patterned with the uncanny texture of worked stone, harvested from a creature that was itself a floor. It remains eerily flat no matter how it is folded, and skilled crafters use it to line false walls and pit covers.

revenant_heart.name: revenant heart
revenant_heart.sprite_desc: A blackened heart wrapped in chains, burning with undying vengeance and refusing to stop beating
revenant_heart.lore: A desiccated heart that has not fully stopped beating, each slow contraction driven not by blood but by something older and colder—pure, unresolved purpose. Apothecaries handle it with reverence and dread, for the will preserved within it does not dissolve easily.

tomb_stone_fragment.name: tomb stone fragment
tomb_stone_fragment.sprite_desc: A chunk of carved tomb stone with hieroglyphic warnings and traces of guardian magic
tomb_stone_fragment.lore: A shard of inscribed limestone carved with royal cartouches and binding glyphs, still faintly warm from the necromantic current that animated the guardian it came from. Scholars say the script on each fragment is unique, the name of the tomb it was sworn to protect.

elemental_ice_core.name: elemental ice core
elemental_ice_core.sprite_desc: A perfect diamond of living ice that never melts, freezing the air around it white
elemental_ice_core.lore: A dense sphere of glacial crystal that never melts, radiating a cold so deep it scorches bare skin white on contact. It hums with the resonance of storms older than recorded seasons, and light passing through it fractures into colours that have no names.

mound_mulch.name: mound mulch
mound_mulch.sprite_desc: A compressed mass of rotting vegetation, fungus, and absorbed lightning energy
mound_mulch.lore: A reeking heap of compressed rot—bark, vine, fungus, and blackened leaf-matter—still faintly crackling with whatever swamp-lightning first gave it purpose. Alchemists find it a rich substrate, bloated with strange nutrients that coax even dead things toward growth.

corrupted_wing_feather.name: corrupted wing feather
corrupted_wing_feather.sprite_desc: A once-white pegasus feather now streaked with dark purple corruption veins
corrupted_wing_feather.lore: A long primary feather marbled black and sickly white, soft as silk on one side and barbed like a briar on the other. The shadow magic threaded through its quill resists both flame and light, and it trails a faint scent of storm clouds turned rancid.

nue_tail_quill.name: nue tail quill
nue_tail_quill.sprite_desc: A stiff black quill from a chimeric beast's snake-tail, crackling with storm static
nue_tail_quill.lore: A hollow, iridescent quill from the serpent tail of the nue, ringed in scales of deep green that shade to bone-white at the tip. The dread that the nue breathes into its victims seems to linger here, and those who handle it too long report a creeping unease they cannot name.

drow_poison_extract.name: drow poison extract
drow_poison_extract.sprite_desc: A tiny obsidian vial of concentrated purple sleep poison favored by the dark elves
drow_poison_extract.lore: A small crystallized bead of distilled Underdark venom, black at its heart and rimmed with deep violet, harvested before it could dissolve with the rest of drow-made things in surface air. Properly diluted by a skilled hand, it induces a heavy, dreamless stupor—imprecisely applied, it does not.

ember_ash.name: ember ash
ember_ash.sprite_desc: A pouch of smoldering orange-red ash from a fire giant's forge, perpetually warm
