ember_ash.lore: The grey-gold ash left where a Fire Giant has fallen, still smoking hours after death, smelling of a forge-fire hot enough to smelt stars. Surtr's kin carry Múspellsheim in their bones, and this residue retains a furnace-heart that no ordinary water can fully quench.

spectral_essence.name: spectral essence
spectral_essence.sprite_desc: A wisp of silvery-blue ectoplasm contained in a spirit bottle, glowing with valkyrie light
spectral_essence.lore: A cool, silver-blue vapour sealed in a vial, condensed from the dissolution of a Valkyrie Shade—it shimmers like moonlight on a battlefield and carries the distant sound of war-horns. Those who breathe it speak of feeling briefly, terribly chosen.

sea_serpent_oil.name: sea serpent oil
sea_serpent_oil.sprite_desc: A flask of deep blue-green oil extracted from a Norse sea serpent, smelling of brine and storm
sea_serpent_oil.lore: A thick, brine-dark oil rendered from the fat of a Norse sea serpent, smelling of deep ocean trenches and old salt-storms. Viking healers rubbed it into rope-burned hands and frostbitten limbs, and sailors claim it keeps wood from rotting even in the grip of Ægir's storms.

anzu_feather.name: anzu feather
anzu_feather.sprite_desc: A magnificent golden-bronze feather the size of a sword, crackling with stolen divine fire
anzu_feather.lore: A massive bronze-gold pinion stripped from the wing of the great lion-eagle, stiff enough to use as a blade and faintly etched with cuneiform lines—as if fate itself left its mark where the Tablet of Destinies was so long grasped. To hold it is to feel briefly, dizzyingly, that the future is a thing that can be stolen.

eyestalk.name: eyestalk
eyestalk.sprite_desc: A severed beholder eyestalk still swiveling, its tip glowing with residual antimagic
eyestalk.lore: A rubbery, cream-coloured stalk tipped with a clouded iris that still twitches toward movement even after death, leaking a faintly iridescent fluid. Wizards who dare to use it in their work find that even a dead beholder's eye resists being deceived.

devil_chain_link.name: devil chain link
devil_chain_link.sprite_desc: A single link of infernal chain that burns with hellfire and cannot be broken by mortal means
devil_chain_link.lore: A single link of black iron from a chain devil's writhing coils, cold to the touch despite the infernal warmth it should carry, its edges worn sharp by years of animated motion. The metal does not rust—it aches, faintly, as though it remembers every wrist it closed around.

shield_core.name: shield guardian core
shield_core.sprite_desc: A glowing blue-white arcane core that once animated a shield guardian, humming with protective magic
shield_core.lore: A fist-sized arcane gemstone extracted from the chest cavity of a shield guardian, warm and faintly humming with stored protective magic. It pulses steadily like a mechanical heart, and artificers say the resonance inside it will attune itself, given time, to whoever carries it longest.

roper_strand.name: roper strand
roper_strand.sprite_desc: A long sticky grey tentacle-strand with a powerful adhesive that grips like iron
roper_strand.lore: A tough, pale tendril of adhesive sinew, glutinous at the tip and fibrous as rope at the root, smelling of wet stone and something faintly animal. Even severed from its source it clings with stubborn purpose, and those who work with it often find their fingers stuck together long after they thought they had washed it clean.

elder_vampire_blood.name: elder vampire blood
elder_vampire_blood.sprite_desc: An ancient crystal vial of thick black-crimson blood that whispers promises of eternal power
elder_vampire_blood.lore: Viscous and almost black, this ancient ichor reeks of turned earth and centuries of predation. The nosferatu's debased bloodline carries a feral potency that aristocratic vampire blood lacks — rawer, hungrier, and far less refined.

pale_master_essence.name: pale master essence
pale_master_essence.sprite_desc: A swirling grey-white essence trapped in a soul gem, radiating deathly cold intellect
pale_master_essence.lore: A waxy residue scraped from flesh that is neither fully alive nor fully dead, smelling faintly of formaldehyde and grave-dust. The pale master's obsessive grafting of undead tissue has saturated this essence with a cold necromantic energy that blurs the boundary between the living and the corpse.

wight_essence.name: wight essence
wight_essence.sprite_desc: A dark blue-grey mist trapped in a sealed jar, draining warmth from everything nearby
wight_essence.lore: A cold, faintly luminous vapor condensed into a dark crystalline shard, humming with the accumulated hatred of centuries. The wight lord's long dominion over the dead has concentrated within it a will so corrosive it can leech warmth from bare skin through a leather pouch.

dread_plate.name: dread plate fragment
dread_plate.sprite_desc: A shard of cursed black plate armor etched with skull motifs, unnaturally heavy
dread_plate.lore: A jagged shard of blackened armor plate wrenched from a fallen paladin's corrupted shell, cold as a tomb and faintly etched with holy symbols now scoured half-away by decades of unholy corruption. The metal hums with a discordant resonance — as though the divine consecration and the darkness that overthrew it are still locked in silent, endless war within the iron.

soul_fragment.name: soul fragment
soul_fragment.sprite_desc: A translucent blue crystal shard containing a screaming fragment of a consumed soul
soul_fragment.lore: A translucent sliver of stolen spirit, cool and weightless as a moth's wing, that pulses with a faint borrowed light. The soul eater spawn tore this from some forgotten living thing, and it retains a ghost of that creature's last desperate vitality.

storm_feather.name: storm feather
storm_feather.sprite_desc: A crackling white-blue feather that arcs with tiny lightning bolts between its barbs
storm_feather.lore: A long, iridescent primary feather that snaps with static discharge when handled, leaving the fingertips tingling and smelling of ozone. Alchemists prize it as a conduit for lightning-working, for the thunderbird's storm is not merely summoned — it is woven into every barb and quill.

sovereign_spore_cap.name: sovereign spore cap
sovereign_spore_cap.sprite_desc: A regal purple-gold mushroom cap the size of a shield, emanating calming telepathic waves
sovereign_spore_cap.lore: A broad, dense cap ringed in deep violet and pale gold, still venting a faint haze of psychoactive spores that drift like luminous smoke. The myconid sovereign governed its kingdom through this crown alone, and even severed, the cap pulses with the ghost of a vast hive-mind.

sphinx_claw.name: sphinx claw
sphinx_claw.sprite_desc: A curved golden claw with hieroglyphic engravings and sand permanently embedded in its grain
sphinx_claw.lore: A curved, tawny talon worn smooth by ages of stone and riddled flesh, faintly warm as though the riddle-heat of the sphinx's gaze still lingers within. Those who hold it too long report unbidden questions rising in their minds — problems with no clean answer.

stone_giant_core.name: stone giant core
stone_giant_core.sprite_desc: A dense sphere of living granite with veins of quartz crystal pulsing with earth magic
stone_giant_core.lore: A dense, fist-sized nodule of granite-grey mineral pulled from deep within a stone giant's chest, banded with veins of quartz that glow dimly in darkness. It carries the immense geological patience of its former host, radiating a steadiness that seems to slow the trembling of exhausted hands.

black_dragon_scale.name: black dragon scale
black_dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A scale of pure obsidian-black that drips residual acid and dissolves cloth on contact
black_dragon_scale.lore: An obsidian-dark scale edged with a faint green iridescence, slick with residual acid that slowly etches whatever surface it rests on. The young black dragon's cruelty is encoded in its very hide — alchemists handle it with tongs and a grudging respect.

naga_scale.name: naga scale
naga_scale.sprite_desc: An emerald-green scale with a hypnotic spiraling pattern that draws the eye inward
naga_scale.lore: A broad, iridescent scale whose inner surface bears faint runic whorls, as though the naga's ancient magical charge has been pressed into the keratin itself. It smells of deep water and old incense, a relic of a guardian that measured its vigil in millennia.

hydra_bile.name: hydra bile
hydra_bile.sprite_desc: A large flask of caustic green bile that bubbles and multiplies when exposed to blood
hydra_bile.lore: A caustic, brackish fluid drawn from the Lernaean Hydra's severed neck, dark as swamp water and faintly luminous at the edges. Heracles learned that only fire could stop what blade could not — this bile carries that same terrible regenerative will, as dangerous to contain as it is invaluable to the learned.

cerebral_fluid.name: cerebral fluid
cerebral_fluid.sprite_desc: A vial of shimmering pink-purple fluid that induces psychic visions when held near the temple
cerebral_fluid.lore: A thin, opalescent liquid extracted from the skull of a mind once belonging to someone else, carrying the faint psychic residue of foreign thoughts. The illithid's domination has so thoroughly marinated this fluid in psionic energy that a drop on the tongue reportedly floods the mind with alien, crystalline clarity.

devil_barb.name: devil barb
devil_barb.sprite_desc: A barbed spine of dark red iron that regrows from its base, never fully removable
devil_barb.lore: A hooked spine the color of old blood, still burning faintly at the tip with hellfire that neither chars the hand nor quite goes out. The hamatula grew these barbs as instruments of eternal torment, and the cruelty of their purpose has been calcified into the bone itself.

golem_stone.name: golem stone
golem_stone.sprite_desc: A chunk of animate granite with a partially visible command sigil carved into its face
golem_stone.lore: A smooth, palm-sized chunk of animated granite extracted from the golem's chest cavity, still faintly warm and pulsing with the residual rhythm of its animating rune. It carries within it the golem's absolute, unhurried momentum — an inertia that feels almost philosophical.

catoblepas_horn.name: catoblepas horn
catoblepas_horn.sprite_desc: A heavy downward-curving horn of dark grey bone, its tip stained with death-breath residue
catoblepas_horn.lore: A heavy, matte-black horn riddled with small fissures that weep a thin, odorless vapor known to wither small plants on contact. The catoblepas could not lift its gaze to meet your eyes, yet this horn concentrates that lethal downward weight into a single terrible point.

nightshade_essence.name: nightshade spawn essence
nightshade_essence.sprite_desc: A vial of absolute darkness in liquid form, draining color from everything it touches
nightshade_essence.lore: A cold, smoke-like residue that pools at the bottom of a vial and refuses to fully dissolve in any solvent, carrying the absolute darkness of creatures born where no light has ever reached. Even this lesser spawn's essence smells of extinguished stars and the silence between heartbeats.

queen_venom_gland.name: spider queen venom gland
queen_venom_gland.sprite_desc: A swollen purple-black venom gland pulsing with the concentrated poison of a spider queen
queen_venom_gland.lore: A pearlescent sac the size of a fist, taut and warm, filled with venom so concentrated it has begun to crystallize at the edges into pale amber nodes. The spider queen's brood-mother poison is engineered for utter subjugation — it does not merely kill, it unmakes the will to resist.

elemental_magma_core.name: magma elemental core
elemental_magma_core.sprite_desc: A molten sphere of living lava encased in a thin obsidian shell, glowing cherry-red
elemental_magma_core.lore: A pulsing sphere of cooling basalt encasing a still-molten heart that glows deep red through its cracks, radiating waves of dry heat that make the air above it shimmer. The magma elemental's essence is the patience of stone broken open by the impatience of fire — volatile, primordial, and hungry to return to form.

corrupted_horn_fragment.name: corrupted unicorn horn
corrupted_horn_fragment.sprite_desc: A spiral horn fragment of once-pure white now veined with sickly purple-black corruption
corrupted_horn_fragment.lore: A jagged shard of what was once milk-white horn, now spiraled black and weeping a slow iridescent ichor that smells of scorched violets and shadow. The corruption has not destroyed the unicorn's power — it has inverted it, and whatever this fragment once purified, it now quietly poisons.

shadow_crystal.name: shadow crystal
shadow_crystal.sprite_desc: A faceted crystal of pure shadow that projects darkness instead of light when illuminated
shadow_crystal.lore: A sliver of crystallized darkness harvested from the aura of a slain drow mage, it hums faintly with absorbed shadow-light and feels colder than stone should. Alchemists prize it as a conduit for illusion-work, believing it holds the border between what is seen and what is merely believed.

red_dragon_scale.name: red dragon scale
red_dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A large crimson scale that radiates intense heat and glows like a dying ember
red_dragon_scale.lore: A plate of deep crimson hide edged in orange, still warm to the touch as if banked coals smolder beneath its surface. It smells of scorched iron and arrogance, and those who carry it are said to feel an unfamiliar contempt stirring in their chest.

scylla_fang.name: scylla fang
scylla_fang.sprite_desc: A massive serrated fang from one of Scylla's six heads, barnacled and reeking of the deep
scylla_fang.lore: One of dozens of serrated teeth shed by the six-headed terror of the straits, yellowed like old ivory and notched from centuries of grinding ship-timber and sailor bone. It weeps a faint brine that never quite dries, as though the sea itself has not yet relinquished its claim.

titan_essence.name: titanspawn essence
titan_essence.sprite_desc: A massive crystal containing swirling golden energy, warm with the power of primordial creation
titan_essence.lore: A thick, luminous fluid that pulses like a slow heartbeat, distilled from the shattered fragment of a being older than Olympus itself. It reeks of deep earth and iron-hot lightning, a smell that triggers an inexplicable ancestral dread in all who draw near.

vrock_feather.name: vrock feather
vrock_feather.sprite_desc: A filthy brown-black vulture feather that releases choking toxic spores when shaken
vrock_feather.lore: A long, greasy primary feather stripped from the wing of a vulture-headed demon, its quill etched with hairline cracks that still vibrate at the frequency of a screech. Crushed and rendered, it is rumored to lend a terrible, ragged energy to the body—at the cost of a creeping savagery.

erinyes_feather.name: erinyes feather
erinyes_feather.sprite_desc: A perfect black-and-gold wing feather from a fallen angel, beautiful and deeply unsettling
erinyes_feather.lore: A flight feather from a Fury's wing, black at the shaft fading to a deep blood-red at the vane, beautiful and perfectly formed despite its infernal origin. It carries the faint scent of copper and divine law perverted, and hedge-mages whisper it is key to binding oaths that cannot be broken.

behir_scale.name: behir scale
behir_scale.sprite_desc: A large electric-blue scale that sparks and crackles with stored lightning when rubbed
behir_scale.lore: A rigid, iridescent plate from the flanks of the twelve-legged serpent, threaded with fine filaments that once carried electrical charge from spine to scale. Even separated from the beast, it crackles faintly against the fingertips and smells of a storm trapped underground.

lord_phylactery.name: necromancer phylactery
lord_phylactery.sprite_desc: An ornate black iron box set with a cracked soul gem, reeking of necromantic power
lord_phylactery.lore: A small lacquered vessel of bone and tarnished silver, faintly warm, housing the fragmented soul of a mage who refused the mercy of a natural death. It whispers at the edge of hearing in a language older than the dungeon itself, offering nothing and demanding everything.

ossuary_shard.name: ossuary shard
ossuary_shard.sprite_desc: A bone fragment from a structure built entirely of fused skeletons, etched with death prayers
ossuary_shard.lore: A splinter of bone that is somehow many bones at once, its grain shifting under careful examination from femur to rib to skull-plate. It carries the residual grief of thousands of disturbed dead, and those who hold it too long report hearing a low, toneless communal moan.

death_essence.name: death essence
death_essence.sprite_desc: A tiny black pearl containing the distilled essence of mortality itself
death_essence.lore: A small vial of colorless vapor that refuses to dissipate, harvested from the dimming presence of a minor avatar of ending. It carries no scent, no warmth, and no cold—only a profound absence that makes the pulse feel suddenly loud and important.

alpha_lycanthrope_blood.name: alpha lycanthrope blood
alpha_lycanthrope_blood.sprite_desc: A flask of silver-flecked blood that boils and shifts form under moonlight
alpha_lycanthrope_blood.lore: Dark arterial blood drawn from a centuries-old alpha, it refuses to fully clot and swirls with a silver luminescence beneath the surface. Those who work with it feel an unwelcome sharpening of the senses—a hunter's hunger for something they cannot name.

wyvern_venom_gland.name: greater wyvern venom gland
wyvern_venom_gland.sprite_desc: A large leathery venom gland with a visible reservoir of potent green-yellow poison
wyvern_venom_gland.lore: A pale, sac-like organ swollen with toxin, slick to the touch and smelling of acid-laced musk. Master poisoners prize the greater wyvern's gland above all others, its venom holding a concentrated lethality that lesser specimens cannot match.

aboleth_mucus.name: aboleth mucus
aboleth_mucus.sprite_desc: A jar of translucent teal mucus that allows water-breathing but slowly enslaves the mind
aboleth_mucus.lore: A thick, opalescent slime harvested from a creature that remembers the world before gods learned their names. It clings to everything it touches with a possessive weight, and those exposed to it unprotected begin to dream of lightless oceans and a hunger that predates hunger itself.

demon_bile.name: hezrou demon bile
demon_bile.sprite_desc: A bronze-sealed jar of toxic green-black bile that dissolves most organic matter on contact
demon_bile.lore: A viscous, greenish-black fluid extracted from the gut of a toad-demon, its stench so caustic that the very air around the vial shimmers. In vanishingly small doses, alchemists claim it can scour poisons from the blood—though the cure is difficult to distinguish from a fresh catastrophe.

devil_venom.name: bone devil venom
devil_venom.sprite_desc: A bone-white vial of paralytic venom extracted from an ossified devil's tail stinger
devil_venom.lore: A crystalline yellow ichor harvested from the segmented tail of an osyluth, it smells of brimstone and old parchment and leaves a faint burn wherever it touches bare skin. Those who have studied infernal toxicology speak of it in hushed tones, equal parts terror and admiration for its elegant, hierarchical lethality.

wyvern_stinger.name: wyvern stinger
wyvern_stinger.sprite_desc: A curved tail stinger of dark green chitin with a hollow venom channel and barbed tip
wyvern_stinger.lore: The barbed terminus of a wyvern's tail, curved like a boar-spear and still slick with the dark venom pooled in its hollow core. Stripped and dried, it serves both as a weapon and a vessel, its natural channel repurposed by clever hands to carry any toxin the dungeon can offer.

giant_bone.name: skeletal giant bone
giant_bone.sprite_desc: An enormous yellowed bone from an undead giant, taller than a human and dense as stone
giant_bone.lore: A femur as long as a grown man is tall, its surface the yellowed white of ancient ivory and grooved where necromantic energies once coursed through the marrow. Ground to powder by those with the strength to manage it, it is said to impart a terrible, borrowed resilience.

sea_dragon_scale.name: sea dragon scale
sea_dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A large scale of deep ocean blue with bioluminescent edges that glow in darkness
sea_dragon_scale.lore: A wide, blue-green scale edged in silver, still faintly damp, with a surface so dense it deflects a knife's edge like tempered steel. It carries the smell of deep salt water and crushing pressure, as though the abyss of the ocean floor is an inch beneath its surface.

void_ichor.name: void ichor
void_ichor.sprite_desc: A sealed lead vial of impossible black fluid from beyond the stars, warping space around it
void_ichor.lore: A liquid that seems to absorb light at its edges rather than reflect it, collected from the wound of a creature that should not exist within coherent reality. It has no smell the mind can retain—only the unsettling certainty, once you set it down, that you have forgotten what you were just thinking.

night_hag_heartstone.name: night hag heartstone
night_hag_heartstone.sprite_desc: A smooth black stone that pulses with a sickly green inner light, warm with trapped nightmares
night_hag_heartstone.lore: A smooth, dark gem pulled from the chest cavity of a night hag, warm as a sleeping body and faintly luminescent with the compressed anguish of stolen souls. Apothecaries claim it can pierce the veil between waking and dreaming, though none speak lightly of what is sometimes found on the other side.

cloudstuff.name: cloudstuff
cloudstuff.sprite_desc: A jar of solidified cloud essence, white fluffy and impossibly light, humming with wind
cloudstuff.lore: A fistful of compressed stormcloud, torn from the very foundations of a cloud giant's floating keep. It hums faintly against the skin, cold and electric, and dissipates slowly like a sigh if not sealed in glass.

cerberus_saliva.name: cerberus saliva
cerberus_saliva.sprite_desc: A fireproof flask of thick amber drool from the three-headed guardian, acidic and burning
cerberus_saliva.lore: Venom-laced foam scraped from one of the three jaws of Hades' eternal sentinel, reeking of asphodel and cold stone. Those who have tasted even its diluted form report hearing the distant wailing of shades.

demon_scales.name: marilith demon scales
demon_scales.sprite_desc: Crimson-black scales from a six-armed demon, each one marked with Abyssal script
demon_scales.lore: Iridescent scales shed from the serpentine flanks of a six-armed demoness, each one honed to a razor edge by centuries of infernal war. They chime softly against one another, as though counting the battles they have survived.

demon_heart.name: nalfeshnee heart
demon_heart.sprite_desc: A massive pulsing heart of dark purple-red, split into asymmetrical demonic chambers
demon_heart.lore: A swollen, bile-dark organ ripped from a judge of the infernal courts, still faintly warm and pulsing with corrupt authority. Those who cook it claim it carries the weight of verdicts rendered in planes mortals were never meant to see.

lesser_draco_bone.name: undead dragon bone
lesser_draco_bone.sprite_desc: A bone shard from an undead dragon, blackened with age and crackling with necrotic green energy
lesser_draco_bone.lore: A bone leached of warmth and marrow by necromantic art, yet still faintly luminous with the memory of draconic fire. It is lighter than it should be, as though whatever once animated it left even its mass behind.

void_shard.name: void shard
void_shard.sprite_desc: A fragment of crystallized void, pure absence given form, darker than any shadow
void_shard.lore: A sliver of absolute nothing made somehow solid, cold beyond cold, that swallows light at its edges and deadens sound in its immediate vicinity. Alchemists covet it as a catalyst for unmaking, though none who handle it long remain entirely whole.

chaos_essence.name: chaos essence
chaos_essence.sprite_desc: A jar of reality-warping fluid that changes color, texture, and state unpredictably
chaos_essence.lore: A viscous, color-shifting ichor distilled from the essence of a glabrezu, smelling of burning promises and corrupted silver. It writhes in its vial as though still whispering bargains to anyone foolish enough to listen.

demi_lich_skull.name: demi-lich skull
demi_lich_skull.sprite_desc: A floating gem-encrusted skull fragment with soul gems in the eye sockets, humming with power
demi_lich_skull.lore: The crumbling cranium of a consciousness so old it outlasted its own body, its empty sockets still flickering with the cold violet light of transcended will. Sages warn that even fragments of it retain enough awareness to be dangerous.

nightwing_membrane.name: nightwing membrane
nightwing_membrane.sprite_desc: A sheet of absolute darkness in membrane form, cold enough to freeze torchlight itself
nightwing_membrane.lore: A thin, impossibly dark membrane stretched between finger-bones of shadow, that absorbs candlelight like a starless sky. Run across the skin it leaves no mark, only a creeping certainty that something immense has noticed you.

roc_talon.name: roc talon
roc_talon.sprite_desc: A curved talon the size of a scimitar, bone-white and scored with wind-erosion grooves
roc_talon.lore: A curved ivory talon the length of a short sword, grooved by the wind of a thousand hunting dives through storm-wracked heights. It smells of ozone and the thin cold air of peaks no human foot has ever reached.

blue_dragon_scale.name: blue dragon scale
blue_dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A brilliant sapphire-blue scale that crackles with arcing electricity between its ridges
blue_dragon_scale.lore: A storm-blue scale crackling with residual static, its surface etched in fractal patterns that seem almost deliberate — as though catalogued by the dragon itself. Electricians and artificers prize it above nearly any other material.

lich_dragon_scale.name: lich dragon scale
lich_dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A scale of rotting dark purple-grey that radiates both draconic and undead power
lich_dragon_scale.lore: A scale from a creature that achieved both draconic supremacy and undying immortality, its surface the color of old bone dusted with grave-frost. It radiates an aura of cold command, the distilled ambition of a being that refused every limit mortality imposed.

storm_essence.name: storm essence
storm_essence.sprite_desc: A sealed crystal sphere containing a miniature thunderstorm with lightning, rain, and wind
storm_essence.lore: Bottled tempest drawn from the blood of a storm giant, a being old enough to have watched coastlines change. It swirls endlessly in its container, smelling of salt and lightning and the deep patience of geological time.

adult_dragon_heart.name: red dragon heart
adult_dragon_heart.sprite_desc: A massive crimson heart the size of a barrel, still smoldering with inner dragonfire
adult_dragon_heart.lore: A massive, heat-radiating organ torn from the chest of a creature whose greed and cruelty became indistinguishable from elemental force. Even cooling, it scorches the hand that holds it, and its blood dries to a crimson lacquer nothing seems to dissolve.

pit_fiend_scale.name: pit fiend scale
pit_fiend_scale.sprite_desc: An enormous blood-red scale from an arch-devil, inscribed with infernal contract law
pit_fiend_scale.lore: A thick obsidian-red plate stripped from a general of the Nine Hells, its underside etched with binding sigils the fiend carved into its own flesh as a testament to infernal discipline. It resists flame entirely and grows faintly warm when held near anything unholy.

insect_carapace.name: insect carapace
insect_carapace.sprite_desc: A lightweight chitin plate from a giant insect, segmented and translucent brown
insect_carapace.lore: The brittle geometric shell of a grid bug, its surface patterned in unnervingly regular angles as though grown according to some invisible magical diagram. Enchanters suspect its structure resonates with forces of spatial order.

bat_wing.name: bat wing
bat_wing.sprite_desc: A thin leathery wing membrane stretched over delicate finger-bones, dark grey-purple
bat_wing.lore: A leathery membrane threaded with fine black veins, still twitching faintly with the echolocation instinct of its former owner. Boiled down it yields an oil said to sharpen hearing to an almost unbearable keenness.

eye_jelly.name: eye jelly
eye_jelly.sprite_desc: A wobbly sphere of transparent yellowish jelly with a dark pupil-like core floating inside
eye_jelly.lore: A trembling, translucent mass harvested from a floating eye, faintly luminescent and cool as river water. Alchemists prize it as a base for sight-enhancing preparations, though it has the unsettling habit of remaining oriented toward the nearest living face.

ogre_hide.name: ogre hide
ogre_hide.sprite_desc: A thick slab of warty brown-grey hide smelling of sweat and old meat
ogre_hide.lore: Thick, scarred hide the color of old mud, tough enough to turn a poorly aimed blade and reeking of sweat and old marrow. Tanners who work it claim it takes dye badly, as though even cured leather retains the ogre's stubborn ill temper.

orc_blood.name: orc blood
orc_blood.sprite_desc: A crude clay pot of dark green-tinted blood, thick and metallic-smelling
orc_blood.lore: Dark, iron-rich blood from a scout bred for endurance and violence, drying quickly to a rust-brown crust with a sharp, mineral bite. Warriors of certain northern traditions drink it mixed with mead before battle, swearing it lends the legs a tireless urgency.

hobgoblin_blood.name: hobgoblin blood
hobgoblin_blood.sprite_desc: A vial of disciplined dark crimson blood with an iron-sharp scent
hobgoblin_blood.lore: The dark, iron-rich blood of a goblinoid warrior-caste, thick as brine and faintly copper on the tongue. Those who know its properties claim it carries the disciplined fury of a soldier's last stand.

bugbear_pelt.name: bugbear pelt
bugbear_pelt.sprite_desc: A patch of coarse brown-orange fur matted with dirt and dried blood
bugbear_pelt.lore: A coarse, matted hide that still smells of damp forest and predatory musk. The fur stands perpetually on end, as though the terror its former owner inflicted has been preserved within the follicles.

battle_ration.name: battle ration
battle_ration.sprite_desc: A cloth-wrapped bundle of hardtack, jerky, and dried fruit from a brigand's pack
battle_ration.lore: Hard tack and salted meat wrapped in waxed cloth, carried by someone who once knew real war. It tastes of desperation and long marches, but it will keep a body moving when nothing else will.

cultist_reagent.name: cultist reagent
cultist_reagent.sprite_desc: A cloth pouch of strange violet ritual powder mixed with crushed gems and bone dust
cultist_reagent.lore: A stoppered vial of viscous fluid that shifts between deep violet and absolute black, humming faintly with borrowed shadow-prayers. Alchemists handle it with lead-lined gloves, aware that the entities it was offered to may still be listening.

devourer_tooth.name: devourer tooth
devourer_tooth.sprite_desc: A massive serrated tooth of yellowed ivory from a devouring beast, warm and hungry
devourer_tooth.lore: A serrated ivory fang from a spawn of Ammit, still faintly warm and reeking of the embalming oils of the Egyptian dead. It is said that meat touched by such a tooth is weighed, somewhere beyond the veil, against a feather.

fenrir_fang.name: Fenrir's Fang
fenrir_fang.lore: A colossal tooth from the World-Wolf, still crackling with cold fury.
fenrir_fang.sprite_desc: An enormous ice-blue fang radiating primordial cold and the hunger of the world-ender

void_essence.name: Void Essence
void_essence.lore: Crystallized nothingness scraped from the Destroyer's form. It absorbs light and hums with terrible potential.
void_essence.sprite_desc: A sealed divine vessel containing swirling purple-black destroyer essence, humming with apocalypse

wolf_meat.name: wolf meat
wolf_meat.sprite_desc: A lean cut of dark red wolf meat with tough sinew and a wild, gamey scent
wolf_meat.lore: Dense, dark muscle from a creature that commanded obedience through howl and gaze alone. Roasted over open flame it carries a wild, almost electric vitality — the kind earned through a thousand coordinated hunts.

slime_core.name: slime core
slime_core.sprite_desc: A dense green orb at the center of a dissolved slime, pulsating with acidic energy
slime_core.lore: A quivering, translucent sphere of concentrated acid suspended in gelatinous membrane, faintly luminescent green. Alchemists treasure it as a universal solvent base, though it must be neutralized before it dissolves the vessel holding it.

frost_sac.name: frost sac
frost_sac.sprite_desc: A swollen ice-blue sac of freezing liquid that chills everything within arm's reach
frost_sac.lore: A pale, membrane-wrapped gland taken from deep within a frost drake's throat, still cold enough to numb bare fingers on contact. It weeps a crystalline fluid that refuses to thaw, even held over an open flame.

arachne_silk_gland.name: arachne silk gland
arachne_silk_gland.sprite_desc: A bulbous silver-white gland trailing impossibly fine silk threads of divine craftsmanship
arachne_silk_gland.lore: Harvested from the spinnerets of a weaver cursed by Athena herself, this gland produces thread finer than any mortal loom could fashion. The silk it yields is said to show, in its woven patterns, the true shapes of things hidden from the eye.

talos_bronze_shard.name: talos bronze shard
talos_bronze_shard.sprite_desc: A jagged shard of ancient bronze automaton plating, still humming with divine engineering
talos_bronze_shard.lore: A fragment of divine bronze from Hephaestus's greatest automated creation, its surface still traced with veins of dried ichor. Metallurgists marvel that it shows no oxidation, as though the god's craft refuses to yield to time.

echidna_venom_sac.name: echidna venom sac
echidna_venom_sac.sprite_desc: A mottled green-black venom sac from the mother of monsters, swollen with primordial toxin
echidna_venom_sac.lore: A leathery, fist-sized sac taken from the Mother of Monsters herself, swollen with a venom that carries the essence of every terrible creature she ever birthed. It pulses faintly, as though something within it has not yet decided what it will become.

erlking_crown_twig.name: erlking crown twig
erlking_crown_twig.sprite_desc: A living twig of pale green wood from the wild hunt king's antler crown, sprouting tiny leaves
erlking_crown_twig.lore: A slender branch of pale wood woven from the Erlking's antlered crown, still carrying the ghost of a melody that makes listeners feel inexplicably compelled to follow. Wreathed in cold forest air, it withers iron nails driven near it.

camazotz_wing_membrane.name: camazotz wing membrane

5.name: lord of the dark sky banquet

camazotz_wing_membrane.sprite_desc: A dark leathery bat-wing membrane that absorbs all light and drips with cave condensation
camazotz_wing_membrane.lore: A thin, midnight-dark membrane stretched between hollow bones, smelling of cave stone and sacrificial smoke from the depths of Xibalba. Held against a flame it reveals no shadow — as though the darkness it belongs to cannot be cast aside.

cacus_ember_gut.name: cacus ember gut
cacus_ember_gut.sprite_desc: A smoldering orange-red organ that belches smoke and tiny flames when squeezed
cacus_ember_gut.lore: A length of charred viscera from a fire-breathing son of Vulcan, still smoldering at the edges with a heat that no water can fully extinguish. Smiths have been known to use it as a forge bellows, claiming it burns hotter than any bellows of leather.

sphinx_riddle_stone.name: sphinx riddle stone
sphinx_riddle_stone.sprite_desc: A golden stone tablet with an ever-shifting riddle carved in hieroglyphics that rearrange themselves
sphinx_riddle_stone.lore: A smooth, pale stone found in the Sphinx's gullet, worn glossy by centuries of patience and the swallowed bones of those who answered wrong. Sages claim it grows warm in the hand of someone who carries an unanswered question.

rangda_mask_splinter.name: rangda mask splinter
rangda_mask_splinter.sprite_desc: A jagged splinter of a demonic mask, painted red and black, pulsing with dark theatrical magic
rangda_mask_splinter.lore: A jagged sliver of lacquered wood from the demon queen's ceremonial mask, painted in crimson and white with a leer that seems to shift in peripheral vision. Those who hold it too long report hearing Leyak laughter from the corners of silent rooms.

nemean_pelt_scrap.name: nemean pelt scrap
nemean_pelt_scrap.sprite_desc: A scrap of invulnerable golden lion hide that no blade can cut, warm as sunlight
nemean_pelt_scrap.lore: A scrap of hide from the lion whose skin turned every blade in Greece, still impossibly tough to the touch and warm as living flesh. No mortal knife can cut it further — it must be worked, as Hercules worked it, by other means entirely.

baba_yaga_mortar_dust.name: baba yaga mortar dust
baba_yaga_mortar_dust.sprite_desc: Grey stone dust from a flying mortar, smelling of ancient Russian forests and impossible magic
baba_yaga_mortar_dust.lore: A grey-white powder scraped from the grinding bowl of Baba Yaga, saturated with centuries of enchanted forest and the residue of every hero and fool she has ever processed. It smells of pine resin, old iron, and something that might be wisdom.

jormungandr_scale.name: jormungandr scale
jormungandr_scale.sprite_desc: A massive sea-green scale from the world serpent, slick with ocean brine and crackling with venom
jormungandr_scale.lore: A palm-wide scale from the World Serpent's juvenile coils, iridescent as deep ocean and cold as the void between stars. Even in this small fragment, the venom that will one day kill a god seeps faintly at the edges, staining the fingers a bruised purple.

sets_jackal_fang.name: set's jackal fang
sets_jackal_fang.sprite_desc: A curved golden-brown jackal fang radiating desert heat and the authority of the god of chaos
sets_jackal_fang.lore: A long, yellowed fang from an enforcer of chaos, still carrying the dry-desert heat of Set's displeasure. Unlike the gentle guidance of Anubis, what this tooth touches it marks for disorder — scholars of the old rites bury such fangs in iron boxes at crossroads.

green_knight_sap.name: green knight sap
green_knight_sap.sprite_desc: Vivid emerald sap that flows like blood from enchanted wood, smelling of eternal spring
green_knight_sap.lore: A thick, viridian ichor that weeps from the Green Knight's severed neck, smelling of deep forest and fresh-turned earth. It pulses faintly even after his death, as though the bargain of the beheading game has never truly been fulfilled.

charybdis_brine.name: charybdis brine
charybdis_brine.sprite_desc: A sealed flask of supernaturally dense seawater that tries to pull everything into its vortex
charybdis_brine.lore: Saltwater drawn from the throat of the great whirlpool herself, still swirling in its vial as if remembering the ships it swallowed. Sailors who have survived her say this brine tastes of the bottom of the world.

ravanas_knuckle.name: ravana's knuckle
ravanas_knuckle.sprite_desc: A massive dark-skinned knuckle bone from one of ten arms, inscribed with Sanskrit war prayers
ravanas_knuckle.lore: A dense, bronze-dark knuckle bone from the crawling arm of the demon king, still warm with Ravana's inexhaustible life-force. Even severed from its master, it clenches and unclenches with a slow, furious will.

wendigo_heart.name: wendigo heart
wendigo_heart.sprite_desc: A frozen black heart encased in ice that radiates insatiable hunger and bitter winter cold
wendigo_heart.lore: A heart of black ice encased in frost-bleached muscle, beating with a cold hunger that never satisfied itself in life. To hold it too long is to feel the first gnawing thought — that whatever you have, it is not enough.

wild_hunt_horn.name: wild hunt horn
wild_hunt_horn.sprite_desc: A curved hunting horn of ancient grey bone, whispering with the sounds of an eternal chase
wild_hunt_horn.lore: A curved horn of pale bone, etched with the names of souls taken across a hundred winter skies. It no longer sounds a note, but those nearby feel the hairs rise on their necks, as though something vast has turned its gaze toward them.

anansi_story_thread.name: anansi story thread
anansi_story_thread.sprite_desc: A single golden spider thread that contains an entire story visible when held to the light
anansi_story_thread.lore: A single silken strand spun by the spider god himself, shimmering between gold and shadow, that seems to tie itself in subtle knots around whatever question you are holding in your mind. Stories are said to live inside it, coiled and waiting.

nidhoggr_root_shard.name: nidhoggr root shard
nidhoggr_root_shard.sprite_desc: A shard of Yggdrasil root gnawed by the world-serpent, dark with corruption and ancient power
nidhoggr_root_shard.lore: A splinter of the World-Gnawer's body — dark as rot, smelling of ancient bark and ruin — that endlessly worries at whatever surface it rests upon with microscopic, patient hunger. It carries within it the slow certainty that all things come apart.

amon_wrath_ember.name: amon's wrath ember
amon_wrath_ember.sprite_desc: A burning coal of pure rage that never cools, glowing angry red with infernal wrath
amon_wrath_ember.lore: A coal-red ember carved from Amon's smoldering flesh, radiating a heat that has nothing to do with warmth and everything to do with rage. It dims only slightly in shadow, as though fury itself refuses to be extinguished.

buer_plague_gland.name: buer's plague gland
buer_plague_gland.sprite_desc: A pustulent green gland weeping with every disease known to demonkind
buer_plague_gland.lore: A glistening, pale-green gland that weeps a viscous fluid thick with the memory of a thousand contagions. Paradoxically, Buer's own lore of herbs is said to be encoded within it — poison and cure folded together in the same terrible organ.

mammon_hunger_crystal.name: mammon's hunger crystal
mammon_hunger_crystal.sprite_desc: A golden crystal that amplifies greed and hunger in all who behold it
mammon_hunger_crystal.lore: A hollow crystal of tarnished gold that devours the light around it rather than refracting it, leaving a cold absence where brightness should be. Even sealed tight, it makes provisions stored nearby taste faintly of nothing.

bael_war_shard.name: bael's war shard
bael_war_shard.sprite_desc: A blood-red iron shard from a demon general's blade, still seeking flesh to cut
bael_war_shard.lore: A jagged fragment of iron forged from fallen swords and broken by divine force, smelling of old blood and the acrid bite of battlefield smoke. It hums with the memory of sixty-six legions, a sound just below hearing that sets the teeth on edge.

samael_death_vial.name: samael's death vial
samael_death_vial.sprite_desc: A tiny vial of absolute stillness, the distilled essence of death itself
samael_death_vial.lore: A slender vial of shadow-dark fluid collected from the angel of death himself — neither fully poison nor fully blessing, neither fully damned nor fully divine. It rests in the palm with the strange lightness of something that has passed through the boundary between worlds.

beleth_quake_stone.name: beleth's quake stone
beleth_quake_stone.sprite_desc: A cracked brown stone that trembles constantly, threatening to split the earth beneath it
beleth_quake_stone.lore: A pale grey stone that vibrates with a deep, subsonic tremor, as though the fault lines of the earth still remember the touch of Beleth's pale horse. Set upon a table, it will slowly walk toward the edge, patient as a crumbling cliff.

abyzou_silence_dust.name: abyzou's silence dust
abyzou_silence_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of pale silver dust that absorbs all sound in its vicinity, eerily silent
abyzou_silence_dust.lore: A fine, colorless ash that makes no sound when it falls, muffling even the whisper of breath in the throat of whoever holds it. It is said to be the ground remnant of the silence before the final word is spoken — the stillness that precedes an ending.

prime_beef.name: prime beef
prime_beef.lore: A thick cut of marbled beef from a Hell Bovine. Despite its infernal origins, it smells absolutely delicious. Moo.
prime_beef.sprite_desc: A magnificent cut of marbled red beef, perfectly aged and glistening with fat

royal_beef.name: royal beef
royal_beef.lore: An exquisite cut of beef from the Cow King himself. The meat shimmers with a faint golden hue. Fit for royalty. Moo.
royal_beef.sprite_desc: An extraordinary golden-edged cut of beef wearing a tiny crown, radiating bovine majesty
